1000685523.english: In this world, ability matters more than personality.
1000685523.korean: 이런 세상에선 인격보다는 능력이 더 중요해요.

1000685524.english: Well, since you're Eli, there's no need to worry about either ability or personality, right?
1000685524.korean: 뭐, 엘리이니 능력이나 인격이나 둘 다 걱정할 필요는 없겠죠?

1000685528.english: First, the Doctor will tell you about the explosives our target uses.
1000685528.korean: 우선 우리 목표가 쓰는 폭발물에 대해서 닥터가 알려줄 거예요.

1000685529.english: Come here, I'll tell you about explosives and detonators.
1000685529.korean: 이리 와, 폭발물이랑 기폭장치에 대해서 알려줄게.

1000685530.english: And I'll introduce you to the friends on Orca.
1000685530.korean: 그리고 오르카에 있는 친구들을 소개해 줄게.

1000685531.english: They're all nice, you'll have a great time!
1000685531.korean: 전부 좋은 애들이니까, 엄청 즐거울 거야!

1000685533.english: I was born to take responsibility for them.

1000685534.english: Therefore, all of their actions are my responsibility.
1000685534.korean: 그러하기에 그녀들의 행위는 모두 나의 책임.

1000685535.english: No excuses are meaningful for our actions.
1000685535.korean: 우리들의 행위에 어떠한 변명도 의미 없다.

1000685536.english: Because the victims cannot forgive us.

1000685537.english: How can a sin be atoned for when there is no one to forgive it?
1000685537.korean: 용서해줄 이가 없는 죄는 어떻게 속죄할 수 있는가?

1000685540.english: I just wanted to bear everyone's sins alone.
1000685540.korean: 모두의 죄만큼은 나 혼자 지길 바랄 뿐이었다.

1000685541.english: The meeting on countermeasures for the boots has ended.

1000685542.english: We have determined that the longer time is given to Janghwa, the greater the casualties will be for our forces. Based on the results of the meeting, we will commence the operation as soon as preparations are complete.
1000685542.korean: 장화에게 시간이 주어질수록 아군의 피해가 커질 거라고 판단. 회의 결과에 따라 준비가 끝나는 대로 작전을 개시하겠습니다.

1000685543.english: Our mongoose team is the main force of the capture operation.
1000685543.korean: 생포 작전의 주력은 저희 몽구스 팀이.

1000685544.english: We request that the other members support the Mongoose Team.
1000685544.korean: 다른 대원들은 몽구스 팀을 지원해주시길 요청합니다.

1000685545.english: Recalling the results of the meeting, we began preparing for the operation.
1000685545.korean: - 회의의 결과를 다시 상기하며 우리는 작전 준비에 들어갔다.

1000685551.english: Let's go somewhere where there are no other people for a moment.
1000685551.korean: 잠시 다른 사람들이 없는 곳으로 가죠.

1000685553.english: What can I do for you?

1000685554.english: While searching through the database recently, I discovered some information…
1000685554.korean: 제가 이번에 데이터 베이스를 뒤지면서 몇 가지 정보를 발견했는데…

1000685555.english: I thought you would be very interested.
1000685555.korean: 당신이 큰 관심을 가질 것 같더라고요.

1000685556.english: … … I’m sorry. We don’t have much time, so could you please get straight to the point?
1000685556.korean: ……죄송합니다. 시간이 별로 없으니 빨리 본론으로 들어가주시겠습니까?

1000685558.english: Could you please take a look at this panel?

1000685559.english: Based on the catalog specs, the Mongoose team is good enough to take on the boots.
1000685559.korean: 카탈로그상 스펙으로는 몽구스 팀이라면 충분히 장화를 상대해 볼 만해요.

1000685560.english: No, the Mongoose team used to deliver results beyond the catalog specifications.
1000685560.korean: 아니, 몽구스 팀은 카탈로그 스펙 이상의 성과를 내곤 했죠.

1000685561.english: However, the Mongoose team before the apocalypse was defeated by the boots every single time.
1000685561.korean: 그런데 멸망 전의 몽구스 팀은 번번히 장화에게 패배했더군요.

1000685562.english: What do you think is the reason?

1000685563.english: According to Miss Shirayuri's report, it must be because an order was issued not to subdue the boots.
1000685563.korean: 시라유리 양의 보고서에 따르면 장화를 제압하지 말라는 명령이 내려와서겠죠.

1000685564.english: There must be one premise underlying that command.
1000685564.korean: 그 명령에는 한 가지 전제가 깔려 있어야해요.

1000685566.english: How can I follow orders when I don't even know what boots are? 'Don't subdue the boots? What are boots?'
1000685566.korean: 장화가 무엇인지 모르는데 어떻게 명령을 따를 수 있겠나요? ‘장화를 제압하지 말라고? 장화가 뭔데?’

1000685567.english: I can tell from you right now that you encountered the boots for the first time.
1000685567.korean: 지금의 당신을 통해 알 수 있어요. 당신은 장화를 이번에 처음 마주쳤다는 것을.

1000685568.english: The Hongryeon of the past would be no different.

1000685569.english: Or perhaps it is because the boots are that experienced.

1000685570.english: She perfectly trapped the mongoose team this time.
1000685570.korean: 그녀는 이번에 완벽하게 몽구스 팀을 함정에 빠트렸습니다.

1000685571.english: I admit it. Thanks to luck, the Mongoose team members only sustained minor injuries in this battle.
1000685571.korean: 인정하죠. 운이 좋았기에 이번에 있었던 전투에서 몽구스 팀원들은 가벼운 부상만 입었습니다.

1000685572.english: Do you want to point this out?

1000685574.english: Could you try to be a little more objective?

1000685575.english: As I said before... we are short on time, so could you please get straight to the point?
1000685575.korean: 다시 말씀드리지만… 시간이 부족하니 본론으로 들어가주시겠습니까?

1000685576.english: Although it wasn't mentioned in the meeting, it is said that when the Mongoose Team and Janghwa encountered each other, the Hongryeon model was unable to properly command.
1000685576.korean: 회의에서 말하지는 않았지만 몽구스 팀과 장화가 마주치면 홍련 모델이 제대로 된 지휘를 하지 못했다고 해요.

1000685577.english: Is the reason… related to the Ratel team?
1000685577.korean: 그 이유… 라텔 팀과 관련되어 있나요?

1000685578.english: Information about the Ratel team is recorded on this panel. Would you like me to read it to you?
1000685578.korean: 이 패널에 라텔 팀에 대한 정보가 기록되어 있는데 읽어드릴까요?

1000685579.english: Ratel Team. An experimental counter-terrorism unit formed in Black River consisting of Turtle Dragon, Foxtrot, Ponies Anger, Rockliner, and Red Lotus.
1000685579.korean: 라텔 팀. 블랙리버에서 실험적으로 터틀드래곤, 폭스트롯, 포니스앵거, 록라이너와 레드로터스로 구성한 대테러부대.

1000685580.english: It is said that the Mongoose Team was formed through training that was incredibly close to actual combat.
1000685580.korean: 이 부대가 한없이 실전에 가까운 훈련을 거쳐 완성된 것이 몽구스 팀이라고 하네요.

1000685581.english: Training that is infinitely close to the real thing…

1000685582.english: From the perspective that it conjures up an image different from the truth in the listener, euphemisms are not much different from lies.
1000685582.korean: 듣는 이에게 사실과 다른 이미지를 떠올리게 한다는 측면에서 보자면 완곡어법도 거짓말과 크게 다를 바가 없겠죠.

1000685583.english: The training method is also recorded here.

1000685584.english: Inciting civilians in anarchic areas to hate specific groups. Suitable groups are attached.
1000685584.korean: 무정부 지역의 민간인들에게 특정집단을 증오하도록 선동. 적합한 집단은 별첨.

1000685585.english: Huh? Saman is included too? Come to think of it, there was some subtle rivalry among the corporations even before the Second Coalition War.
1000685585.korean: 어라? 삼안도 포함되어 있네요? 하긴 2차 연합전쟁 전에도 기업들끼리 은근히 견제가 있기는 했죠.

1000685586.english: Approach incited civilians, supply them with weapons, and train them to turn them into terrorists. Consult on operations and manipulate them.
1000685586.korean: 선동된 민간인들에게 접근, 무기를 공급하고 훈련시켜 테러리스트화. 작전을 컨설턴트하며 그들을 조종할 것.

1000685587.english: Deploy the Ratel Team in the event of a terrorist attack to secure real-world data.
1000685587.korean: 테러 발생 시 라텔 팀을 투입하여 실전 데이터를 확보.

1000685588.english: Test various suppression methods for efficient counter-terrorism. Do not consider civilian casualties, excluding VIPs.
1000685588.korean: 효율적인 테러 진압을 위해 여러 방식의 진압 방식을 시험할 것. 이 때 VIP를 제외한 민간인 사상자는 고려하지 말 것.

1000685589.english: It turns out this is information known only to a very small minority even within Black River. It seems they had the data because this branch is close to the experiment site.
1000685589.korean: 블랙리버 내부에서도 극히 소수만 알고 있는 정보더군요. 그나마 이곳 지부가 실험지와 가까워서 자료가 있었나 보네요.

1000685590.english: There were probably people on the outside who noticed, but... well. It would be foolish to take a wedge with Black River for the sake of a few civilians.
1000685590.korean: 외부에서도 알아차린 사람이 있었겠지만… 뭐. 고작 민간인 몇을 위해서 블랙리버와 척을 지는 것은 미련한 짓이죠.

1000685592.english: If this is mere speculation, I apologize.

1000685593.english: However, if there is a stain on your memory, this is the only thing I know.
1000685593.korean: 하지만 당신의 기억의 오점이라면 저는 이것밖에 모르겠어요.

1000685594.english: Hong-ryeon. Did you hate yourself through Jang-hwa, just as Jang-hwa hated her own kind?
1000685594.korean: 홍련 씨. 당신은 장화가 동족혐오를 한 것처럼 장화를 통해 자기혐오를 했나요?

1000685595.english: So, is that why the Hongryeons of the past couldn't put up proper resistance?
1000685595.korean: 그래서 과거의 홍련들은 제대로 된 저항을 하지 못한 건가요?

1000685596.english: Did you see your past self in the appearance of the boots that resemble you?
1000685596.korean: 당신은 당신을 닮은 장화의 모습에서 과거의 당신의 모습을 봤나요?

1000685597.english: If my speculation is true, please stay out of this operation.
1000685597.korean: 만약 제 억측이 사실이라면 이 작전에서 손 떼세요.

1000685598.english: It is not for selfish reasons, but to prevent the team members from suffering losses due to you.
1000685598.korean: 이기적인 이유가 아니라 당신으로 인해서 대원들의 손실을 막기 위해서예요.

1000685599.english: I will not give up on the operation.

1000685600.english: Do you think we can make this operation a success?

1000685601.english: I will make it a success.

1000685603.english: Because the Commander said, "I hope everyone comes back smiling."

1000685605.english: Even the boots… I will make sure you can come back smiling.
1000685605.korean: 장화까지… 웃으면서 돌아올 수 있게 할 겁니다.

1000685606.english: We are bioroids. For better or for worse.

1000685607.english: Commander, if you hear such words from a human, you have no choice but to obey.
1000685607.korean: 사령관님께, 인간에게 그런 말을 들으면 따를 수밖에 없겠죠.

1000685608.english: It is a world where choices often lead to death, but…
1000685608.korean: 선택이 죽음으로 귀결되는 일이 많은 세상이지만…

1000685609.english: Would you like to permanently delete 'Counter-Terrorism Unit Mass Production Plan No. 41'?

1000685611.english: The file has been permanently deleted.

1000685613.english: 080 will support you to the fullest.

1000685614.english: Even I, who am saying this... am not clean.

1000685615.english: It is the sin of the Shirayuri of the past, not of me now...
1000685615.korean: 지금의 제가 아닌 과거의 시라유리들의 죄이지만…

1000685616.english: If I have inherited their legacy, I must also inherit their original sin.
1000685616.korean: 그녀들의 유산을 물려받았으면 그녀들의 원죄 또한 물려받아야겠죠.

1000685617.english: However, it would be foolish to give up trying not to get dirty just because it has already gotten dirty.
1000685617.korean: 하지만 이미 더러워졌다고 더러워지지 않게 노력하는 것을 포기하는 건 미련한 짓이겠죠.

1000685619.english: … … I’ve softened up a lot, too.

1000685620.english: I try not to get it dirty...

1000685621.english: That seems to be all we can do.
1000685621.korean: 우리가 할 수 있는 것은 그 정도뿐이군요.

1000685622.english: It seems it can't be cleaned again.

1000685623.english: So... the Hongryeon of the past must have made such a choice.
1000685623.korean: 그러니까… 과거의 홍련은 그런 선택을 했겠죠.

1000685625.english: Our objective is to capture the hostile Bioroid JangHwa alive.
1000685625.korean: 우리의 목표는 적대적인 바이오로이드, 장화의 생포입니다.

1000685626.english: If it's us, according to plan, we can definitely achieve the objective.
1000685626.korean: 우리들이라면, 작전대로라면 충분히 목표를 달성할 수 있습니다.

1000685629.english: Just trust me! Whether bullets or bombs, I'll block them all with my shield!
1000685629.korean: 저만 믿으세요! 총알이든 폭탄이든 제 방패로 모두 막을 게요!

1000685630.english: Wait a moment. Let me finish the chocolate.

1000685631.english: I wish Boots would make us move as much as the chocolate we've eaten...
1000685631.korean: 장화가 우릴 초콜릿 먹은 만큼 움직이게 해주면 좋겠는데…

1000685632.english: If we don't get enough exercise, should I make you carry my file bunker on the way back?
1000685632.korean: 운동이 부족하면 돌아올 때 내 파일 벙커 들게 해줄까?

1000685634.english: It'd be bad if my beloved gun got jealous, right?

1000685635.english: You messed with the Mongoose Team.

1000685636.english: I'll make them cry and say "I'm sorry."

1000685641.english: <The Rose that Blooms on the Lotus> To be continued in Part 2.

1000685644.english: Good. Shall we move and work out the detailed plan as we go?
1000685644.korean: 좋아. 일단 이동하면서 구체적인 계획을 짜도록 할까?

1000685645.english: Let's land. We've come this far, we can't back down.
1000685645.korean: 상륙하자. 여기까지 와서 물러날 수는 없잖아.

1000685646.english: But the educational institution was a branch of an intelligence agency?

1000685647.english: If it's an intelligence agency, shouldn't it be hidden?

1000685651.english: If you make contact with survivors, request they join or cooperate.
1000685651.korean: 생존자와 접촉하면 합류 혹은 협력을 요청해.

1000685653.english: It's fine. Do as you're comfortable.

1000685654.english: Why is Boots hostile to us?

1000685657.english: ...Crimson Lotus was restored on Orca, right?

1000685658.english: Did I confuse her with another Crimson Lotus?

1000685660.english: Reequip on the Orca to prepare for an assault.
1000685660.korean: 습격을 대비해서 오르카 호에서 재정비해 줘.

1000685661.english: You can just say it however's comfortable.

1000685662.english: Have you lived since before humanity's extinction?

1000685666.english: You have permission. But be careful.

1000685667.english: Maria Leoboros? What is her relation to Angel?

1000685671.english: This is info from the 080, right?

1000685672.english: Then Angel would have known too, right?

1000685673.english: It doesn't seem like Angel would leave Maria alone without a special reason.
1000685673.korean: 앙헬이 특별한 이유 없이 마리아를 가만 둘 리가 없어 보여서.

1000685674.english: She wanted to wipe them out in one stroke...

1000685675.english: Okay. Capture Boots alive. Mongoose Team will lead and execute the operation.
1000685675.korean: 좋아. 장화는 생포. 작전은 몽구스 팀이 주도해서 실행.

1000685679.english: Isn't the UOU Academy 080 branch already secured?
1000685679.korean: UOU학원 080 지부는 확보가 끝난 거 아냐?

1000685681.english: Other members, actively support the Mongoose Team.
1000685681.korean: 다른 대원들은 몽구스 팀을 적극적으로 지원해줘.

1000685683.english: - Birds chirp, and the fragrant scent of flowers mixed with the cool spring breeze tickles the tip of my nose.
1000685683.korean: - 새들이 지저귀고, 시원한 봄바람에 섞인 향긋한 꽃내음이 코 끝을 살랑거리며 간지럽힌다.

1000685684.english: - On such a day, even if you oversleep a little, you can be forgiven.
1000685684.korean: - 이런 날에는 늦잠을 좀 자더라도 용서받을 수 있는 법.

1000685685.english: - I pulled the blanket over myself, closed my eyes, and quietly sought sleep.
1000685685.korean: - 나는 이불을 뒤집어쓴 채, 눈을 감고 조용히 잠을 청했다.

1000685687.english: - It seems like someone is whispering in a small voice.
1000685687.korean: - 누군가 작은 목소리로 속삭이는 것 같다.

1000685688.english: - ...Maybe it's the sound of the wind or the song of birds.

1000685690.english: - I felt something tickling my side, but the warm sunlight shining on me wasn't enough to wake me.
1000685690.korean: - 뭔가 내 옆구리를 간지르는 것 같았지만, 따사로운 햇빛을 받고 있는 나를 깨울 수는 없었다.

1000685693.english: - Something soft crashed down on my body.
1000685693.korean: - 뭔가 푹신한 물체가 내 몸 위를 덮쳤다.

1000685694.english: - When I opened my eyes, there was...

1000685697.english: I came to wake you up, so when I call, you should get up right away!
1000685697.korean: 내가 깨우러 왔는데, 부르면 바로바로 일어나야지!

1000685698.english: Even though you're already in your second year, what are you going to do if you start the new semester by being late?
1000685698.korean: 아무리 이제 2학년이라지만, 새학기부터 지각하면 어쩔 생각이야?

1000685699.english: - Hirume, in an appearance I had never seen before, was sitting there.

1000685700.english: - And on top of that... for some reason her way of speaking seemed completely different.
1000685700.korean: - 거기에다... 어째선지 말투도 엄청나게 달라진 것 같은데.

1000685701.english: Yeah, why are you calling me again?

1000685702.english: You're not sulking because I woke you roughly, right? I tried my ve~ry best to wake you gently, you know?
1000685702.korean: 거칠게 깨워서 삐진 건 아니지? 난 최~대한 부드럽게 깨우려고 노력했거든?

1000685703.english: I worked hard to tickle you with my tail.

1000685704.english: What? This? Well, since my uniform got torn last night, I had no choice but to borrow the uniform your mother used to wear.
1000685704.korean: 뭐? 이거? 그야, 어제 밤에 교복이 찢어져서 어쩔 수 없이 너희 어머니가 입던 교복을 빌려 입은 거잖아.

1000685705.english: Don't tell me you're going to say you don't remember? It was just yesterday.
1000685705.korean: 설마 기억 안 난다고 하려는 건 아니지? 바로 어제 일인데.

1000685706.english: ...Judging from your expression, you really don't remember? You fail as a childhood friend, Commander.
1000685706.korean: ...표정 보니까 진짜 기억 안 나는 모양이네? 소꿉친구 실격이야, 사령관.

1000685707.english: Kyahaha, just kidding, just kidding. Come on, it's me—we both know I wouldn't get that mad.
1000685707.korean: 꺄하핫, 농담이야, 농담. 다른 사람도 아니고, 내가 그 정도로 화낼 리가 없잖아?

1000685708.english: Be thankful you have such a kind childhood friend, Commander.
1000685708.korean: 착한 소꿉친구를 둔 걸 다행으로 알라고, 사령관.

1000685709.english: Now let's hurry! At this rate we really will be late.
1000685709.korean: 그럼 빨리 가자! 이러다가 진짜로 지각하겠어.

1000685710.english: - Strange. This doesn't seem like my room...
1000685710.korean: - 이상하다. 여긴 내 방이 아닌 것 같은데...

1000685711.english: - A dream? No, it feels too real for that...
1000685711.korean: - 꿈인가? 아니, 그러기에는 너무 현실감이 넘치는데...

1000685712.english: - Just as my mind started to go hazy, Hirume grabbed my wrist and pulled me out of bed.
1000685712.korean: - 정신이 멍해지려는 찰나, 히루메가 내 손목을 잡고 침대에서 일으켰다.

1000685713.english: Seriously, get a hold of yourself! You need to get up and go to school now!
1000685713.korean: 정말이지, 정신 차려! 이제 일어나서 학교에 가야 한다고!

1000685714.english: Come on, change quickly and get out here!

1000685715.english: - Still dazed, I followed Hirume to school.
1000685715.korean: - 나는 아직 어안이 벙벙한 상태로 히루메를 따라 학교로 향했다.

1000685716.english: - Luckily, we arrived just before the school gate closed.
1000685716.korean: - 다행히도, 히루메와 나는 교문이 닫히기 직전 학교에 도착할 수 있었다.

1000685717.english: Don't relax yet! If you're late on the first day, you'll get scolded!
1000685717.korean: 아직 긴장 풀면 안 돼! 오늘 첫날이라서 늦으면 혼난단 말이야!

1000685718.english: Well, we are a little late already... but there's still a chance the teacher hasn't arrived yet!
1000685718.korean: 뭐, 이미 조금 늦긴 했지만... 그래도 아직 선생님이 오지 않았을 가능성이 있어!

1000685720.english: - And as a result of rushing down the hallway...

1000685721.english: Late on the first day, and even running in the hallways? That's very brave of you.
1000685721.korean: 첫날부터 늦은데다, 복도에서 뛰어다니기까지 하다니, 아주 용감한 행동이군요.

1000685722.english: Shall I take that as a request for punishment?
1000685722.korean: 벌을 받고 싶다는 뜻으로 이해해도 되겠죠?

1000685723.english: Oh dear, now you're even calling out the teacher's name so casually?
1000685723.korean: 저런, 이제는 선생님 이름까지 막 부르는 건가요?

1000685724.english: It seems Commander has turned into a delinquent like Miss Barbariana.
1000685724.korean: 아무래도 사령관도 바바리아나 양처럼 불량학생이 되어버린 모양이군요.

1000685725.english: - While I trembled in fear at that, laughter echoed from inside the classroom.
1000685725.korean: - 그 모습에 내가 공포에 떨고 있을 때, 교실 안에서 웃음소리가 들려왔다.

1000685726.english: Ahaha, Commander, that expression is hilarious! You look totally "Hum-bi-baek-san"!
1000685726.korean: 아하하, 사령관 그 표정 완전 웃겨! 완전 ‘험비백산’한 표정이야!

1000685732.english: I like "Zombie Smash" better though? I'll just call it Zombie Smash!
1000685732.korean: 좀비박살 쪽이 더 마음에 드는걸? 그냥 좀비박살로 할래!

1000685734.english: Anyway, I'm not the one who'll get scolded by Vice President Shirayuri for not studying...
1000685734.korean: 어차피 시라유리 부회장에게 공부 좀 하라고 혼나는 건 제가 아니니까...

1000685735.english: - Over there in the corner, Tomo and Armand were bickering...
1000685735.korean: - 저 한 구석에서 티격태격 싸우는 토모와 아르망도 보이고...

1000685736.english: Hah, don't be so harsh, teacher.

1000685737.english: It's the first day of the semester, right? So let's just let it slide.
1000685737.korean: 학기 첫 날이잖아? 그러니까 관대하게 넘어가 줘.

1000685738.english: Well, I'm saying that because I was late too...
1000685738.korean: 뭐, 나도 늦어서 하는 말이긴 한데...

1000685739.english: On a day this nice, perfect for going out, you should praise us for not skipping class.
1000685739.korean: 오늘처럼 놀러 가기 좋은 날에 땡땡이 안 친 걸 칭찬해 줘야지.

1000685740.english: That's right, even Linty held back her desire to quietly go flower viewing.
1000685740.korean: 맞아요, 린티도 슬며시 꽃구경을 가고 싶은 마음을 꾹 참고 있다고요.

1000685741.english: ...Studying is a student's duty. There's no such thing as praising someone for not skipping class.
1000685741.korean: ...공부는 학생의 본분. 땡땡이를 안 쳤다고 칭찬해 주는 건 있을 수 없는 일이예요.

1000685742.english: But well... since it's the first day of the semester, I'll overlook it this time.
1000685742.korean: 하지만 뭐... 학기 첫 날이니, 한 번은 넘어가 드리도록 하죠.

1000685743.english: There won't be a next time, so be careful, alright?

1000685744.english: You heard me defending you, right, Commander? Treat me at the snack shop later, okay?
1000685744.korean: 내가 열심히 변호한 거 들었지, 사령관? 이따가 매점에서 한 턱 내라?

1000685745.english: I'm expecting a big feast, so look forward to it.

1000685746.english: Ah, and I want mint chocolate ice cream! —Linty.

1000685747.english: - Even Barbariana and Linty, trying to slyly steal my tuna cans.
1000685747.korean: - 은근슬쩍 내 참치캔을 갈취하려 드는 바바리아나와 린티까지.

1000685748.english: - The members of Orca were sitting in the classroom as if nothing was unusual.
1000685748.korean: - 오르카의 대원들이 아무렇지도 않게 교실에 앉아 있었다.

1000685749.english: Now then, shall we continue with the morning assembly?

1000685750.english: - What on earth is going on? Is this Fex's mental attack?

1000685751.english: - Next, will we see Triton in a sailor uniform?
1000685751.korean: - 이 다음엔 뭐, 세일러복을 입은 트리톤이라도 나오는 건가?

1000685752.english: - Or Stronghold in a Café Horizon uniform?
1000685752.korean: - 아니면 카페 호라이즌 유니폼을 입은 스트롱홀드?

1000685753.english: - Just as my mind began to go hazy, sparks crackled from the "Whip of Love" in Alexandra's hand.
1000685753.korean: - 정신이 멍해지려는 찰나, 알렉산드라가 손에 들고 있는 ‘사랑의 채찍’이 파지직대며 전기를 튀기는 소리가 들려왔다.

1000685754.english: - ...Even if this is Fex's mental attack, I'd rather not become Roast Commander.
1000685754.korean: - ...지금 상황이 펙스의 정신공격이라고 하더라도, 전기구이 사령관이 되는 건 사양이다.

1000685755.english: - For now, let's wait until the morning assembly is over before figuring things out...
1000685755.korean: - 일단 아침조회가 끝나고 나서 상황을 파악해 보도록 하자...

1000685756.english: ...Alright then, that concludes the morning assembly. Use the remaining time to focus on your classes.
1000685756.korean: ...자, 그럼, 아침조회는 이만 마치도록 하죠. 남은 시간, 수업에 집중하도록 하세요.

1000685758.english: - Alexandra winked at us and left the classroom...
1000685758.korean: - 알렉산드라는 우리에게 윙크를 날리고 교실을 떠났고...

1000685759.english: - I started racking my brain to figure out what on earth was going on.
1000685759.korean: - 나는 대체 이게 어떻게 된 일인지 파악하기 위해 머리를 쥐어짜기 시작했다.

1000685760.english: - Just then, a soft tail tapped my shoulder.
1000685760.korean: - 그 때, 부드러운 꼬리가 내 어깨를 톡톡 두드렸다.

1000685761.english: Are you okay? You don't look so good this morning.
1000685761.korean: 괜찮아? 아침부터 영 표정이 안 좋네.

1000685762.english: Want to go up to the rooftop for some air?

1000685763.english: See, I told you not to overdo it with Steel Line Online. Don't go doing weird stuff like a "5-Brownie Party 3-Win Streak Challenge"...
1000685763.korean: 그러게 내가 스틸라인 온라인은 적당히 하라고 했잖아. 브라우니 5인 파티로 3연승하기 챌린지 같은 이상한 짓 하지 말고...

1000685764.english: - A 5-Brownie Party 3-Win Streak... urgh, my head...!

1000685765.english: - The pain was so strong that as I recalled the forgotten past, I finally remembered what this situation was.
1000685765.korean: - 너무 고통스러워서 잊고 있던 과거를 떠올리자, 지금 이 상황이 어떻게 된 일인지 드디어 기억해낼 수 있었다.

1000685766.english: - Yeah, the place I am in right now...
1000685766.korean: - 그래, 지금 내가 있는 이 곳은...

1000685767.english: - It's inside a virtual reality game.

1000685769.english: - Today was the day Alpha and Daphne's work suspension order would be lifted.
1000685769.korean: - 오늘은 알파와 다프네가 내린 업무금지령이 해제되는 날.

1000685770.english: - After happily finishing breakfast, I picked up my data pad in high spirits.
1000685770.korean: - 기분 좋게 아침식사를 마치고 온 나는 즐거운 마음으로 데이터 패드를 꺼내들었다.

1000685772.english: Yes. I heard the master won't be able to work for a while...
1000685772.korean: 네. 주인님께서 당분간 일을 하실 수 없는 상황이라고 들어서...

1000685774.english: - I couldn't complain about having no work in front of Black Wyrm, who had worked so hard to help me...
1000685774.korean: - 날 돕기 위해 열심히 일한 블랙 웜 앞에서 일이 없다고 툴툴댈 수는 없는 노릇...

1000685775.english: - In a gloomy mood, I turned on Steel Line Online, but as expected, my friend list was completely empty.
1000685775.korean: - 우울한 기분으로 스틸라인 온라인을 켰지만, 아니나 다를까, 친구창도 텅텅 비어 있었다.

1000685776.english: - At this hour, there was no one to play with anyway.
1000685776.korean: - 이 시간에 같이 게임 할 사람이 있을 리 없지.

1000685777.english: You're looking for something fun to do?

1000685778.english: Perfect timing then, Watson! Of course something fun is waiting!
1000685778.korean: 그렇다면 마침 딱 좋은 타이밍이네, 왓슨! 물론 재밌는 일이 기다리고 있지!

1000685780.english: Black Wyrm, Watson, good morning. Are you busy right now?
1000685780.korean: 블랙 웜, 왓슨, 좋은 아침. 지금 바빠?

1000685781.english: Ah, it's nothing big... I made a game and wanted to ask you to test it.
1000685781.korean: 아, 다른 건 아니고... 내가 게임을 하나 만들었는데, 테스트를 부탁하려고.

1000685782.english: The City Guard members don't really play games... so you're the only one I can ask, Watson.
1000685782.korean: 시티가드 대원들은 게임을 잘 안 하니까... 이런 부탁을 할 사람은 왓슨 밖에 없단 말이지.

1000685783.english: Hehe, try guessing. Let me give you a hint...
1000685783.korean: 후후, 한 번 맞춰봐. 힌트를 좀 주자면...

1000685784.english: It's the genre most fitting for a spring day with chirping birds and cherry blossoms fluttering in the wind.
1000685784.korean: 새들이 지저귀고, 분홍빛 벚꽃비가 휘날리는 봄날에 가장 어울리는 장르야.

1000685785.english: - Oh wow, that's unusually easy for Lianne?
1000685785.korean: - 이런, 리앤답지 않게 너무 쉬운 문제인데?

1000685787.english: No, actually I want to ask you—what on earth made you think of an action FPS in that situation?
1000685787.korean: 아니, 반대로 내가 묻고 싶은데? 대체 무슨 생각을 했길래 거기서 액션 FPS가 나오는 거야?

1000685788.english: ...Anyway, it's a romance sim. That's a genre you're familiar with, right, Watson?
1000685788.korean: ...아무튼 이 게임은 연애 시뮬레이션이야. 왓슨은 익숙한 장르지?

1000685789.english: It's a virtual reality game, and the NPCs are made using the data of Orca's members. So you won't have too much trouble playing without extra explanation.
1000685789.korean: 가상현실 게임이고, 게임 내에 등장하는 NPC들은 오르카의 대원들의 데이터를 이용해서 만들어 놓았어. 그러니 따로 설명하지 않아도 플레이하기 그렇게 어렵지는 않을 거야.

1000685790.english: - If the NPCs are the squad members... then wouldn't that mean I'd have to romance myself?
1000685790.korean: - NPC들이 대원들이라는 건... 결국 자기 자신을 공략해야 하는 상황일 테니까.

1000685791.english: Not exactly. Because there's an option that turns every NPC into Watson.
1000685791.korean: 아니, 그렇진 않을 걸? 왜냐면 게임 내에 등장하는 모든 NPC를 왓슨으로 바꿔주는 옵션이 있거든.

1000685792.english: Combine that with the costume customization outfits from the in-game shop and you can meet...
1000685792.korean: 그 기능이랑, 인게임 상점에서 판매하는 NPC 꾸미기 의상을 결합하면...

1000685793.english: "Cyclops Prince Watson," or "Your Personal Chef Watson," or even "One-Year-Memory Watson," and many other versions of yourself.
1000685793.korean: ‘사이클롭스 프린스 왓슨’ 이라거나, ‘당신만을 위한 주방장 왓슨’, 아니면 ‘1년간의 추억 왓슨’ 등등 다양한 모습의 왓슨을 만나볼 수 있단 말씀.

1000685795.english: I apologize, Master. That was a feature I suggested.
1000685795.korean: 죄송합니다, 주인님. 제가 건의 드린 기능입니다.

1000685796.english: - I don't exactly want to play a romance sim where the NPCs look like me...
1000685796.korean: - 내 얼굴을 한 NPC와 연애 시뮬레이션을 하고 싶진 않아...

1000685797.english: Hehe, too bad. I thought it'd be fun.

1000685798.english: Well then, shall we start the test play?

1000685800.english: - Lianne had made many games before.

1000685801.english: - They were always well-made, with fun stories, but... they all shared one hidden trap.
1000685801.korean: - 하나같이 잘 만들어진 게임이고, 스토리도 재밌었으나, 그 게임들에는 공통적으로 한 가지 함정이 숨어 있었으니...

1000685802.english: - Every single one was packed with puzzles or deduction elements.
1000685802.korean: - 전부 퍼즐이나 추리 요소가 강하게 들어가 있었다는 것이다.

1000685803.english: - Even when playing Lianne's very first game, Super Orca Sisters...
1000685803.korean: - 리앤이 처음 만든 게임, ‘슈퍼 오르카 시스터즈’를 할 때에도 분명...

1000685804.english: Wait a minute! I have to solve a puzzle to get to the hidden stage?!
1000685804.korean: 잠깐만! 숨겨진 스테이지로 가려면 퍼즐을 풀라고?

1000685805.english: Why is there suddenly a puzzle?!

1000685806.english: While playing, you can solve math puzzles and study math in a fun way!
1000685806.korean: 게임을 하면서 수학 퍼즐을 풀어서, 재미있게 수학을 공부할 수 있어!

1000685807.english: What do you think? Isn't it fun?

1000685809.english: - ...So you could never let your guard down.
1000685809.korean: - ...이러니 결코 방심을 할 수 없는 것이다.

1000685811.english: Hehe, well... guess I can't hide it anymore. Yes, there are deduction elements again. But!
1000685811.korean: 후후, 뭐... 더 숨길 수 없겠네. 맞아. 이번 게임에도 추리 요소가 있어. 하지만!

1000685812.english: This time, they're really fun and don't break the flow of the story.
1000685812.korean: 이번에는 정말 재미있고 이야기의 흐름도 끊지 않는 추리 요소야.

1000685813.english: This game is for two players.

1000685814.english: Yep. In other words... one of the NPCs is actually a real Orca member, only pretending to be an NPC!
1000685814.korean: 응. 다시 말해서... 게임 내의 NPC 중 한 명은 진짜 오르카의 대원이라는 거지. NPC를 연기하고 있을 뿐!

1000685815.english: And Watson's goal is to find out who it is. Fun, right?
1000685815.korean: 그리고 왓슨의 목표는 그 대원을 찾아내는 거야. 어때, 재밌겠지?

1000685816.english: Your reaction is colder than I expected...

1000685817.english: Alright, how about this: if you guess correctly, I'll give you an incredible reward.
1000685817.korean: 좋아, 그럼 이렇게 하자. 왓슨이 정답을 맞힌다면, 내가 엄청난 선물을 줄게.

1000685818.english: I'm talking about the recently acquired mission records of former City Guard members.
1000685818.korean: 바로, 최근에 입수한 과거 시티가드 대원들의 작전 기록이야.

1000685819.english: I'll hand the task of sorting them over to you. How's that sound?
1000685819.korean: 이걸 정리하는 일을 왓슨에게 넘겨줄게. 어때?

1000685821.english: - The merciful Lady Lianne generously bestows the mercy of giving me more work—how could I refuse?
1000685821.korean: - 자비로운 리앤님께서 자비롭게 일거리를 넘겨주신다는데 어찌 거절할 수가 있으리오.

1000685822.english: Haha, you really are the only one who'd be happy to receive extra work as a reward.
1000685822.korean: 하하, 일거리를 선물로 주는데 좋아하는 사람은 왓슨 밖에 없을 거야.

1000685823.english: So, shall we begin right away?

1000685824.english: Luckily, I have no appointments this afternoon.

1000685825.english: So please, don't worry and enjoy the game, Master.
1000685825.korean: 그러니 안심하시고 게임을 하셔도 괜찮습니다, 주인님.

1000685826.english: - Me not being busy means Orca has no emergencies—that should be a good thing, but why does it hurt so much inside?
1000685826.korean: - 내가 바쁘지 않다는 건 오르카에 별 일이 없다는 말이니까... 분명 좋은 일인데, 왜 이렇게 마음이 아플까?

1000685827.english: - Clutching my aching chest, I followed Lianne to the game center...
1000685827.korean: - 나는 쓰린 가슴을 부여잡고, 리앤을 따라 게임센터로 향했다...

1000685828.english: Oh, and there's one thing you should be careful about...
1000685828.korean: 참, 그리고 주의할 점이 하나 있는데...

1000685829.english: At first, your consciousness might feel a little hazy and your memory could get jumbled.
1000685829.korean: 처음에는 의식이 좀 몽롱하고 기억에 혼선이 있을 수 있어.

1000685830.english: Hey... would I ever recommend something dangerous to you, Watson?
1000685830.korean: 에이... 내가 왓슨한테 위험한 걸 권할 리가 없잖아?

1000685832.english: I already finished talking it over with the Doctor.
1000685832.korean: 이미 닥터와 이야기를 다 끝내 놨지.

1000685833.english: It's nothing serious. I just added a special feature to help you get more immersed in the game... but it's pretty heavy, so the initial load time is long, which causes that effect.
1000685833.korean: 큰 문제는 아니고, 그냥 게임에 더 몰입할 수 있도록 특수 기능을 넣었는데... 그게 용량이 좀 커서, 처음 로딩이 오래 걸리다보니 생기는 문제라고 하더라.

1000685834.english: It's the function that makes extra NPCs look like Orca's members. For example, the NPC driving a train might appear as Ajax...
1000685834.korean: 엑스트라 NPC가 오르카의 대원으로 보이는 기능이야. 예를 들면, 기차 운전을 하는 역할의 NPC가 아이아스로 나온다던지...

1000685835.english: Anyway, according to the Doctor, things will return to normal if you just wait a little.
1000685835.korean: 아무튼 닥터의 말로는 잠시 기다리고 있으면 정상으로 돌아올 거래.

1000685836.english: Alright, now... put on the VR goggles...

1000685838.english: <This work is fiction. The characters, products, and organizations appearing in this work are not related to reality and are fictional.>
1000685838.korean: <이 작품은 픽션입니다. 본 작품에 등장하는 인물, 제품 및 단체는 실제와 무관한 것으로 허구임을 밝힙니다.>

1000685839.english: Also, <All characters appearing in this work are adults and over 18 years old.>
1000685839.korean: 또한, <이 작품에 등장하는 인물은 모두 성인이며, 18세 이상입니다.>

1000685840.english: Heh, don't expect too much from a test play, Watson!
1000685840.korean: 어허, 테스트 플레이에 너무 많은 걸 기대하지 마, 왓슨!

1000685844.english: Your expression's been strange for a while, Commander. Something wrong?
1000685844.korean: 아까부터 표정이 이상한데, 사령관. 무슨 일 있어?

1000685845.english: Yeah? Then let's head home now. We've got to eat dinner too.
1000685845.korean: 그래? 그럼 이제 집에 가자. 저녁도 먹어야지.

1000685846.english: Of course not. Your mothers will cook for you.

1000685849.english: - But as the saying goes, "never say never"...

1000685850.english: - When I opened the door, familiar faces appeared.
1000685850.korean: - 집 문을 열자, 익숙한 얼굴들이 나타났다.

1000685851.english: - Ah, so that's why they said "mothers."

1000685852.english: - Don't tell me I have to do the "goo-goo ga-ga" routine again...

1000685853.english: - Wait, I'm sure I saw someone in a school uniform earlier?
1000685853.korean: - 잠깐, 분명 아까 교복을 입은 사람을 본 것 같은데?

1000685855.english: Nice to see you, Hirume. I dropped by to pass on a message to the Commander.
1000685855.korean: 반갑군, 히루메. 잠시 사령관에게 전해줄 이야기가 있어 들렀다.

1000685856.english: I see. Then, would you like to stay for dinner?
1000685856.korean: 그렇군요? 그럼, 같이 저녁 드시고 가실래요?

1000685857.english: Hehe, I appreciate it, but I'll have to decline. I need to look after my juniors.
1000685857.korean: 후후, 고맙지만 사양하도록 하지. 동생들을 돌봐야 하니까.

1000685858.english: And... I'll be borrowing the Commander for a moment.

1000685859.english: Hmm, this distance should be fine.
1000685859.korean: 흠, 이 정도 멀어지면 문제 없겠군요.

1000685860.english: Ah, don't worry, Excellency. Right now, I'm just playing the role of your senior.
1000685860.korean: 아, 걱정하지 마십시오, 각하. 저는 지금은 각하의 선배 역할이니까요.

1000685861.english: Now then... I'll explain some information necessary for progressing in the game.
1000685861.korean: 자, 그럼... 앞으로의 게임 진행에 필요한 정보를 말씀드리겠습니다.

1000685862.english: A guide NPC is necessary, so this was unavoidable.
1000685862.korean: 가이드 NPC는 필요하니까요. 어쩔 수 없는 선택이었습니다.

1000685864.english: The playtime of this game is the one year left until Vice President Shirayuri and I, as upperclassmen, graduate.
1000685864.korean: 게임의 플레이타임은 저와 시라유리 부회장, 즉 상급생 두 명이 졸업할 때까지 남은 1년입니다.

1000685865.english: Because... it says here, "that's the tradition." I'm not entirely sure what that means, though.
1000685865.korean: 왜냐하면, 그게 전통이니까... 라고 쓰여 있군요. 무슨 뜻인지는 잘 모르겠지만요.

1000685866.english: So, Excellency, for the next year of school life, you simply enjoy it and make good memories with the heroine of your choice.
1000685866.korean: 그러니 각하께서는 앞으로 남은 1년동안 학창시절을 즐기며, 원하시는 히로인과 좋은 추억을 만드시면 됩니다.

1000685867.english: For reference, I'm also a romanceable heroine.

1000685869.english: Hehe. Just kidding—don't feel pressured. It's just a game, after all. You only need to enjoy your school days.
1000685869.korean: 후후. 농담이니 그렇게 부담을 갖지 않으셔도 됩니다. 게임은 어디까지나 게임. 각하께선 그저 학창시절을 즐기시면 될 뿐입니다.

1000685870.english: Well then, I'll be going now.

1000685871.english: What did you and Mari-senpai talk about?

1000685873.english: What business could she have with a model student like you? Suspicious...
1000685873.korean: 사령관 같은 모범생한테 무슨 할 말이 있다고? 영 수상한데.

1000685874.english: No way around it! Commander, when you choose a club, the student council is off-limits. Absolutely banned!
1000685874.korean: 안 되겠다! 사령관, 부활동 정할 때 학생회는 금지야, 금지!

1000685875.english: Mari-senpai's clearly aiming for you. Aiming straight for...
1000685875.korean: 아무래도 마리 선배가 사령관을 노리고 있는 게 틀림없어. 바로...

1000685876.english: ...the secretary position in the student council!

1000685877.english: Yeah, the secretary. The one who gets buried in work.
1000685877.korean: 그래, 서기. 일만 잔뜩 시키는 그 서기 말이야.

1000685878.english: - What... you can do a ton of work even inside the game?
1000685878.korean: - 뭐... 게임 속에서도 일을 잔뜩 할 수 있다고?

1000685880.english: ...I can tell what you're thinking just by looking at your face.

1000685881.english: No! You've been studying so you haven't been hanging out with me lately. I can't let you take even more time here!
1000685881.korean: 안 돼! 안 그래도 요즘 공부한다고 나랑 잘 안 놀아주잖아. 여기서 더 시간을 뺏길 수는 없어!

1000685882.english: Join the swim club, the band, martial arts... even the cheer squad is fine.
1000685882.korean: 수영부, 밴드부, 아니면 무술부나... 하다못해 치어리더부에 들어가더라도 상관 없어.

1000685883.english: ...The point is you mustn't work here either!
1000685883.korean: ...요점은 여기서도 일을 하면 안 된다는 거지!

1000685885.english: Oh, what a pity. I thought you'd do well even in the student council, Commander.
1000685885.korean: 어머, 아쉽네요. 사령관이라면 학생회에서도 잘 할 거라고 생각했는데.

1000685886.english: Well, if you're as diligent as the Commander, you'd do great anywhere. This mother believes in you.
1000685886.korean: 뭐, 사령관처럼 성실한 아이라면 어디서든 잘 할 수 있을 겝니다. 이 어미는 사령관을 믿고 있어요.

1000685887.english: Then how about a "return-home" club like in first year? Don't do activities, just come back and spend time with the moms.
1000685887.korean: 그럼 1학년때처럼 귀가부는 어떤가요? 부활동은 하지 말고 돌아와서, 엄마들이랑 시간을 보내는 거예요.

1000685890.english: - At that moment, Frigga and Maria produced a baby bottle and a bib from somewhere...
1000685890.korean: - 그 순간, 프리가와 마리아가 어딘가에서 젖병과 턱받이를 꺼내들었다...

1000685891.english: What a shame. I thought spending time with Master... no, Commander would be nice.
1000685891.korean: 아쉽네요. 주인... 아니, 사령관이랑 시간을 보내는 것도 좋을 것 같았는데.

1000685892.english: Extracurriculars are fine, but wouldn't it be pleasant to sit calmly listening to a funeral march and plan for the afterlife together?
1000685892.korean: 부활동도 좋지만, 같이 장송곡을 들으며 차분하게 사후의 계획을 세우는 것도 즐겁지 않을까요?

1000685894.english: Then want to join the band with me?

1000685895.english: We have vocals, guitar, bass, drums — just bring your body!
1000685895.korean: 보컬, 기타, 베이스, 드럼 다 있어서 몸만 오면 돼!

1000685896.english: - At first I was about to nod at Hirume's suggestion, but one thought came to mind.
1000685896.korean: - 처음에는 히루메의 말에 고개를 끄덕이려고 했으나, 한 가지 생각이 떠올랐다.

1000685897.english: - I have never really enjoyed school life. In the first place, I never even attended school.
1000685897.korean: - 나는 학창시절을 즐겨 본 적이 없다는 것이다. 애초에 학교를 다닌 적도 없고.

1000685898.english: - So this would be a good chance to try various clubs and enjoy school life.
1000685898.korean: - 그러니 이번 기회에 여러 부활동을 알아보며 학창시절을 즐기는 것도 좋을 것 같았다.

1000685901.english: Now, how is it? Isn't it fun? This is the pre-war romantic comedy highteen drama that spies and sisters are obsessed with these days, <She From Space>!
1000685901.korean: 자, 어떻더냐? 재미있지 않느냐? 이것이 요즘 첩과 자매들이 푹 빠진 전쟁 전의 로맨틱 코미디 하이틴 드라마, <우주에서 온 그녀>다!

1000685902.english: By the way, the heroine that the spy supports is Husarda, the protagonist's childhood friend and an astronaut. The scene early on where she looks at Earth from space thinking of the protagonist was really impressive...
1000685902.korean: 참고로 첩이 응원하는 히로인은 주인공의 소꿉친구이자 우주비행사 역할로 나오는 후사르다. 초반에 우주에서 지구를 바라보며 주인공을 생각하는 장면이 아주 인상깊었지...

1000685903.english: Alice-Big Sis liked Scarab, the head of the science club, because their colors matched. Which heroine do you like best?
1000685903.korean: 앨리스 언니는 컬러가 비슷해서 마음에 든다며 과학부 부장인 스카라비아를 응원하던데, 그대는 어떤 히로인이 제일 마음에 드느냐?

1000685904.english: Hm? You didn't find it very fun?

1000685905.english: - I don't have memories of childhood, let alone school days.
1000685905.korean: - 나는 학창시절은 고사하고, 어린 시절의 기억도 없는 상황 아닌가.

1000685906.english: - That thought kept coming back, and I couldn't deeply immerse myself in the drama.
1000685906.korean: - 그 생각이 자꾸 떠올라서 드라마에 깊이 몰입할 수 없었다.

1000685908.english: ...Hearing that, I feel the spy showed me this drama for a reason.
1000685908.korean: ...그 말을 들으니, 첩이 괜히 이 드라마를 보여준 것 같구나.

1000685909.english: - And in fact, I'm living a life more enjoyable than the school life depicted in the drama.
1000685909.korean: - 그리고 사실 나는 드라마에서 묘사되는 학창생활보다 더 즐거운 삶을 살고 있지 않은가.

1000685910.english: Hehe, that's true. Especially since you're with the spy...
1000685910.korean: 후훗, 그건 그렇지. 바로 첩과 함께하는...

1000685911.english: - If I became a student, could I handle so much work? Absolutely not.
1000685911.korean: - 내가 만약 학생이 된다면, 지금처럼 많은 업무를 처리할 수 있을까? 절대 아닐 것이다.

1000685912.english: - Studying, volunteer activities, competitions, college entrance exams... there'd be more than a few things to worry about.
1000685912.korean: - 공부에, 봉사활동에, 대회 참가에, 대학 입시에... 신경 써야 할 것들이 한두개가 아니겠지.

1000685913.english: - I probably couldn't even dream of handling paperwork or inventory checks.
1000685913.korean: - 아마 서류업무나 비품 재고 파악 같은 건 꿈도 못 꿀 것이다.

1000685914.english: - Just imagining it scares me so much my hands and feet tremble...
1000685914.korean: - 상상만 해도 두려워서 손발이 덜덜 떨리는 삶이다...

1000685916.english: You're more of a workaholic than I thought...

1000685917.english: Alright. If that's the case, I'll teach you how to enjoy school life!
1000685917.korean: 좋다. 그렇게 나온다면, 첩이 그대에게 학창시절의 즐거움을 알려주도록 하겠다!

1000685918.english: Of course I've never enjoyed school life myself...
1000685918.korean: 물론 첩도 학창시절을 즐겨본 경험은 없지만...

1000685919.english: But I've already built up enough knowledge from dramas and manga, so there's no problem!
1000685919.korean: 드라마와 만화로 지식은 이미 충분히 쌓았으니, 문제는 없을 것이다!

1000685920.english: - Hmm, I really appreciate the intention, but...

1000685922.english: Right now, honestly, I don't know.

1000685923.english: But I'll find some way. Trust me and wait...!
1000685923.korean: 하지만 어떻게든 방법을 찾아보도록 하겠다. 그대는 첩을 믿고 기다리고 있거라...!

1000685925.english: - Lianne and Mari said similar things...

1000685927.english: - Everyone's trying to make me have a good time, so it'd be rude not to enjoy it.
1000685927.korean: - 모두가 내게 즐거운 시간을 만들어주려고 노력하고 있는데, 즐기지 않으면 오히려 실례겠지.

1000685928.english: - I decided that starting tomorrow, I'd seriously look for a club activity.
1000685928.korean: - 나는 내일부터 진지하게 부활동을 찾아보기로 마음먹었다.

1000685929.english: - Of course, it'd be even better if along the way I could take on some fun office work or accounting duties.
1000685929.korean: - 물론, 그 과정에서 재미있는 사무업무나 회계업무도 맡을 수 있으면 더 좋고.

1000685931.english: Well, even if your grades are higher, Commander, I've got more club experience!
1000685931.korean: 그럼, 성적은 사령관이 더 높지만, 부활동 경험은 내가 더 많다고!

1000685932.english: You just have to trust me and follow along!

1000685933.english: Alright, then the very first club we'll check out is...
1000685933.korean: 좋아, 그럼 가장 먼저 찾아갈 부활동은...

1000685934.english: the Archery Club, where Vice President Shirayuri is!

1000685935.english: Commander and Hirume? What brings you here?

1000685936.english: Ah, just the right timing! Hello hello. You see, the Commander's only ever been studying until now.
1000685936.korean: 아, 마침 만났네! 안녕 안녕. 다름이 아니고, 사령관이 여태까진 계속 공부만 했잖아?

1000685937.english: Well, it looks like you've done quite a few other things too...
1000685937.korean: 뭐, 그 밖에도 이것저것 꽤 한 것 같지만...

1000685940.english: I don't know about that, but anyway, the Commander said starting in second year they'd like to try a club, so we've been checking around.
1000685940.korean: 그건 잘 모르겠고... 사령관이 2학년부터는 부활동을 해보려고 한다길래, 어디가 좋을까 돌아다니고 있었지.

1000685942.english: It won't be easy. Will you be alright?

1000685943.english: Very well. Then, let's start lightly...

1000685945.english: - ...The next day, I took a day off school from muscle pain.
1000685945.korean: - ...다음 날, 나는 근육통으로 학교를 하루 쉬었다.

1000685946.english: ...The Archery Club seems to have been a failure...

1000685947.english: But there are still lots of clubs left! The second one to try is... the Swimming Club!
1000685947.korean: 그래도 아직 부활동은 많이 남아 있어! 두 번째로 들어갈 활동은 바로... 수영부!

1000685948.english: Our school's Swimming Club is super popular. There might not be any spots left, though...
1000685948.korean: 우리 학교 수영부는 인기가 많아. 그래서 아마 남은 자리가 없을지도 모르겠지만...

1000685949.english: But let's at least try it out!

1000685954.english: Yeah, Commander-senpai helped us with counseling before and lent lots of support!
1000685954.korean: 응, 전에 사령관 선배가 우리 상담도 해주고 이것저것 많이 도와줬거든!

1000685955.english: It was just the start of the semester, yet you even counseled the new students... you've been very busy, haven't you, you... no, Commander.
1000685955.korean: 학기 초인데, 신입생 상담까지 해 주고... 아주 바빴구나, 그대... 아니, 사령관.

1000685956.english: Hehe, Neri did take a lot of Commander-senpai's time. But thanks to Commander-senpai, I got over my slump and got picked as a main competitor for the tournament this time!
1000685956.korean: 에헤헤, 네리가 사령관 선배 시간을 많이 뺐기는 했지. 그래도 사령관 선배 덕분에 슬럼프를 벗어나서, 이번에 대회 주전으로 뽑혔다?

1000685957.english: What do you think, isn't Neri amazing?

1000685958.english: Yeah! That's right. Neri's super Neri-Neri!

1000685959.english: Anyway... Commander-senpai and Hirume-senpai, what brings you here?
1000685959.korean: 참, 그나저나... 사령관 선배랑 히루메 선배는 여기 무슨 일로 왔어?

1000685960.english: Hmm... Neri's not sure either! Wait just a moment, I'll get Mr. Serpent!
1000685960.korean: 으음... 그건 네리도 잘 모르는데! 잠시만, 서펀트 선생님!

1000685961.english: Joining the Swimming Club? Hmm... that'll be difficult. The roster is full.
1000685961.korean: 수영부 입부? 으음... 아무래도 그건 힘들 것 같아. 수영부 정원이 꽉 찼거든...

1000685962.english: Hearing Commander's situation makes me want to help somehow, but rules are rules. Sorry.
1000685962.korean: 사령관의 사정을 들어보니 어떻게든 도와주고 싶긴 하지만, 규정은 규정이니까. 미안.

1000685963.english: - It seems joining the Swimming Club will be difficult.
1000685963.korean: - 아무래도 수영부에 입부하는 건 힘들 것 같다.

1000685964.english: - Well, since it's a game made by Lianne, I could probably explain the situation and ask for a favor, but...
1000685964.korean: - 뭐, 리앤이 만든 게임인 만큼 어떻게든 사정을 설명하고 양해를 구한다면 방법이 있겠지만...

1000685965.english: - ...the childhood-friend version of Hirume would probably sulk, so I decided to give up on the Swimming Club.
1000685965.korean: - ...소꿉친구 버전 히루메가 삐질 것 같으니 수영부는 포기하기로 했다.

1000685966.english: ...Th-this time, I'll definitely be able to join!
1000685966.korean: ...이, 이번에는 반드시 가입할 수 있을 거야!

1000685967.english: Because this club has two kids from our class as members!
1000685967.korean: 왜냐하면, 이 부활동은 우리 반 애들이 두 명이나 부원으로 있는 활동이거든!

1000685968.english: Huh? You want to join our club?

1000685969.english: Well, since it's the Commander, I guess we could let you in...
1000685969.korean: 글쎄, 사령관 정도면 허락해 줄 수 있기는 한데...

1000685970.korean: 그렇긴 하지? 사령관 정도면 초 쿨한 편이고.

1000685972.english: Our club is the Gyaru Club, so are you sure it's okay for the Commander to join?
1000685972.korean: 우리 부는 갸루부인데 사령관이 입부해도 괜찮은 거 맞아?

1000685973.english: Yup yup, Gyaru Club. It's a club that researches gyaru culture.
1000685973.korean: 응응, 갸루부. 갸루도에 대해서 연구하는 부야.

1000685974.english: It's about how to become a super gyaru. Totally popular with trendy high school girls these days.
1000685974.korean: 그건~ 초 대단한 갸루가 되는 법이야. 요즘 잘 나가는 여고생들 사이에서 완전 유행이라고.

1000685975.english: It's like flower arranging or tea ceremony — a cultural activity that suits proper young ladies...
1000685975.korean: 꽃꽂이나 다도처럼 요조숙녀들에게 어울리는 교양 활동인데...

1000685976.english: but instead it's about becoming cuter, more gyaru-like, and cooler!
1000685976.korean: 더 귀엽고, 더 갸루스러워지고, 더 쿨해지는 법이라고 할까?

1000685977.english: Of course, Linty doesn't need any of that — she's already cute enough~
1000685977.korean: 물론, 린티는 그런 거 안해도 이미 충분히 귀엽지만~

1000685978.english: Of course. I got proper permission from Principal Alpha.

1000685979.english: On top of that, we even have a teacher to guide us!
1000685979.korean: 게다가 우리를 지도해 줄 선생님도 있다고!

1000685982.english: Turns out, she used to be a legendary gyaru back in the day.
1000685982.korean: 알고 보니까 옛날에 전설적인 갸루였다고 하더라고.

1000685983.english: So now we're training under Teacher HongRyeon, aiming to become the ultimate gyaru and surpass Arsenal-senpai.
1000685983.korean: 그래서 홍련 선생님 밑에서 수련하고 있지. 최고의 갸루가 되어서 아스널 선배를 뛰어넘기 위해.

1000685984.english: - ...It seems the Gyaru Club is far too much for me.
1000685984.korean: - ...아무래도 갸루부는 내겐 너무 어려운 곳인 것 같다.

1000685987.english: Still, that's too bad. I wanted to do a club together with you, Commander. Well then, see you next time.
1000685987.korean: 그래도 좀 아쉽네. 사령관이랑 같이 부활동 하고 싶었는데. 그럼, 다음에 또 보자고.

1000685988.english: - After that, I wandered around searching for a club I could join...
1000685988.korean: - 그 뒤로 내가 가입할 수 있는 부활동을 찾아 여기저기를 돌아다녀 봤지만...

1000685989.english: Thank you for showing interest in the Tea Ceremony Club. However... I'm sorry.
1000685989.korean: 다도부에 관심을 가져줘서 고맙군. 하지만... 미안하게 되었다.

1000685990.english: Our room is too small, so we've decided not to take any more members.
1000685990.korean: 다도부는 부실이 너무 작은 관계로 더 이상 인원을 뽑지 않기로 했다.

1000685992.english: Oh, hello Commander? You're here to join the Forest Management Club? Good choice.
1000685992.korean: 어, 안녕 사령관? 우리 산림관리부에 입부하려고? 좋은 선택이야.

1000685993.english: Our Forest Management Club contributes to society through all kinds of activities. For example, during vacation we go to the Amazon to manage the rainforest...
1000685993.korean: 우리 산림관리부는 여러 가지 다양한 활동을 해서 사회에 공헌하는 부활동이야. 예를 들어, 방학 때 아마존에 가서 열대우림을 관리하는데...

1000685994.english: - Activities that were on too big a scale for me...
1000685994.korean: - 내가 하기에는 너무 스케일이 큰 활동이거나...

1000685996.english: This is the Magical Girl Club. Even Magical Gentlemen are not permitted to enter this girls-only space.
1000685996.korean: 여기는 마법소녀부. 매지컬 젠틀맨조차 출입할 수 없는 소녀들의 공간이다.

1000685997.english: Male gentlemen should use the Magical Boy Club instead.

1000685999.english: - In the end, the last place Hirume brought me was...
1000685999.korean: - 결국, 마지막으로 히루메가 나를 데려간 곳은...

1000686000.english: ...This time you'll really be able to join!
1000686000.korean: ...이번에는 진짜로 입부 할 수 있을 거야!

1000686002.english: the Band Club, where I'm the president!

1000686003.english: Everyone, I brought a new member!

1000686005.english: We never heard anything about a new member coming?
1000686005.korean: 신입 부원이 온다는 말은 처음 들었는데요?

1000686007.english: What are you talking about, Hirume...?

1000686009.english: The Commander's my childhood friend, and since they wanted to try a club, we've been looking around together.
1000686009.korean: 사령관은 내 소꿉친군데, 이번에 부활동을 하고 싶다길래 같이 부활동을 알아보고 있었거든?

1000686010.english: But since there wasn't any other club that really fit, I brought them to our Band Club!
1000686010.korean: 근데 사령관이 들어갈 만한 동아리가 하나도 안 보여서, 우리 밴드부로 데려왔어!

1000686011.english: Hmm... well, we've got plenty of room in the roster, so one more member isn't a big problem, but...
1000686011.korean: 으음... 동아리 정원이야 아직 넉넉하니까 한 명쯤 더 오는 건 큰 문제가 아니지만...

1000686012.english: Commander, do you know how to play any instruments?
1000686012.korean: 사령관, 할 줄 아는 악기는 있어?

1000686013.english: - No, but I've heard even castanets are pretty hard to master... this might be tricky?
1000686013.korean: - 아니, 캐스터네츠도 제대로 하려면 꽤 어렵다고 들었는데... 좀 아슬아슬한가?

1000686014.english: If you can't play any instruments, it'll be a little difficult...
1000686014.korean: 할 줄 아는 악기가 없으면 좀 곤란한데...

1000686015.english: - Of course, I can't play any instruments. I've never tried.
1000686015.korean: - 물론 내가 다룰 수 있는 악기는 없다. 다뤄본 적이 없으니까.

1000686016.english: - But... I do have one career experience unlike anyone else's.
1000686016.korean: - 하지만... 내게는 남들과는 다른 경력이 하나 있지 않은가.

1000686017.english: - That's my producer experience, built up through Project Orca!
1000686017.korean: - 바로 프로젝트 오르카로 다져진 프로듀서 경험이!

1000686018.english: Whaaat? So the Commander was actually the producer of the super-popular idol group Sky Knights, who made tons of hit songs like <Lover Lover>, <Heart-Pounding☆Sparkle★Sparkle>, and <With You>?!
1000686018.korean: 에에엑? <러버러버>나 <두근☆두근 반짝★반짝>, <With You> 같은 명곡을 잔뜩 만들어낸 초인기 아이돌 그룹 스카이 나이츠의 프로듀서가 사실 사령관이었다고요?

1000686019.english: Then could that rumor also be true? The one about Linty, the leader of Mint Choco Shake, actually being Lindwurm who attends our school!
1000686019.korean: 그럼 설마 그 소문도 사실인가요? 민트초코쉐이크의 리더인 린티가 우리랑 같은 학교에 다니는 린트블룸이라는 소문 말이에요!

1000686020.english: Here, you'd be a manager, but...

1000686021.english: Hmm... alright! You've got the skills, and the passion.
1000686021.korean: 흐음... 좋아! 능력도 충분하고, 열정도 있고.

1000686022.english: I support Commander becoming our manager!
1000686022.korean: 난 사령관이 우리 매니저가 되는 거 찬성!

1000686023.english: Me too... I'm all for it.

1000686024.english: I want to try doing a band together with the Commander.
1000686024.korean: 사령관이랑 같이... 밴드 해 보고 싶어.

1000686025.english: I'm in favor as well! If the producer of Sky Knights becomes our manager, we'll feel really secure!
1000686025.korean: 저도 찬성이요! 스카이 나이츠의 프로듀서가 저희 매니저가 되어준다면 든든할 거예요!

1000686026.english: Even if we don't get our own dedicated concert hall like the Sky Knights, we could still grow a lot, right?
1000686026.korean: 스카이 나이츠처럼 전용 콘서트 홀이 생길 정도까진 아니라도, 저희도 엄청 실력이 늘 수 있겠죠!

1000686027.english: - Wait, in this world, the Sky Knights actually got their own concert hall?
1000686027.korean: - 아니, 이 세계의 스카이 나이츠는 전용 콘서트 홀까지 생겼다고?

1000686030.english: From now on, Commander, you're the band club manager!

1000686031.english: - ...And so I became the manager of Orca Academy's band.
1000686031.korean: - ...그렇게 나는 오르카 학원 밴드의 매니저가 되었다.

1000686032.english: - After deciding to join a club, time flew by like an arrow.
1000686032.korean: - 부활동에 들어가기로 결정한 후, 시간은 쏜살같이 지나갔다.

1000686033.english: - Not just figuratively—it really skipped through most of the school life part.
1000686033.korean: - 체감상으로 그랬다는 게 아니라, 정말로 대부분의 학창생활 파트를 스킵했다는 이야기다.

1000686034.english: - Probably because if you had to play through all 365 days, the game would drag on too much.
1000686034.korean: - 아무래도 1년 365일을 전부 플레이했다간 게임이 너무 늘어지기 때문이겠지.

1000686035.english: - Still, you could make monthly schedules, and even during club activities, you could directly enjoy a few important events. For example...
1000686035.korean: - 하지만, 한 달 단위로 스케줄을 짜고, 부활동을 하는 도중에도 몇몇 중요한 이벤트들은 직접 즐길 수 있었다. 예를 들면...

1000686036.english: ...Here, Valentine's chocolate. Valentine's Day already passed though.

1000686037.english: Take it, to commemorate you joining the band club.

1000686039.english: - Even in this world, I can't escape Valentine's chocolate...
1000686039.korean: - 이 세계에서도 발렌타인 초콜릿은 피할 수가 없구나...

1000686043.english: Shall we go to the pool?

1000686044.english: ...Last time I went in, my tail fur clogged the drain...

1000686045.english: I don't want to go through that again...

1000686046.english: Then let's go to the beach, the beach!

1000686048.english: - Come to think of it, I've never seen Spartoia and Hirume in swimsuits before...
1000686048.korean: - 그러고 보니, 스파토이아와 히루메의 수영복 차림은 본 적이 없었지...

1000686049.english: - A swimsuit viewing session... no, a summer training camp for teamwork!
1000686049.korean: - 수영복 감상회... 아니, 여름 합숙 팀워크 트레이닝이다!

1000686050.english: The train heading to the beach will soon depart.

1000686051.english: Passengers, please board the train in an orderly manner.
1000686051.korean: 승객 여러분은 질서를 지켜 열차에 탑승해 주세요.

1000686052.english: The beach... it's my first time going to the beach. I'm excited!
1000686052.korean: 바다라... 바다에 가는 건 처음인데. 기대되네!

1000686053.korean: 다들 기대 많이 한 것 같은데?

1000686054.english: That's right. Actually... as soon as summer break started, we were preparing this event!
1000686054.korean: 맞아요. 사실... 여름방학이 열리자마자 이 이벤트를 준비하고 있었어요!

1000686055.english: Summer means the beach! The beach means summer! It makes no sense to have summer without going to the beach!
1000686055.korean: 여름 하면 바다! 바다 하면 여름! 여름인데 바다에 안 가는 건 어불성설이죠!

1000686056.english: A bold swimsuit to appeal to that person you secretly care about! Water play and beach volleyball to follow, and then tanning! Applying sunscreen and tanning oil as the distance between two people shrinks!
1000686056.korean: 은근히 신경 쓰이는 그 사람에게 어필하기 위한 과감한 수영복! 이어지는 물놀이와 비치발리볼, 그리고 선탠! 선크림과 태닝 오일을 발라주며 점점 좁혀지는 두 사람 간의 거리!

1000686057.english: It's such an old cliché, but it really works!
1000686057.korean: 이게 또 정말 오래된 클리셰지만 엄청 잘 먹히거든요!

1000686058.english: But the real highlight isn't during the day—it's at night! When night falls, fireworks burst all over the sandy shore! And as the beautiful sparks light up the sky, two people's lips slowly draw closer!
1000686058.korean: 하지만 진짜는 낮이 아니라, 해가 진 후의 밤이죠! 밤이 되면 백사장 여기저기서 터지는 폭죽! 그리고 아름다운 불꽃을 보며 서서히 가까워지는 두 사람의 입술!

1000686059.english: Kyaa~! Just thinking about it is already so romantic! That's the perfect summer vacation plan!
1000686059.korean: 꺄아~! 생각만 해도 벌써 로맨틱하네요! 바로 이게 완벽한 여름 휴가 계획이죠!

1000686061.english: I didn't bring fireworks or tanning oil...

1000686062.korean: 걱정하지 마세요! 제가 전부 다 준비해 왔으니까요!

1000686063.english: Parasols! Sunscreen! Tanning oil! And fireworks too!
1000686063.korean: 파라솔! 선크림! 태닝 오일! 그리고 폭죽까지!

1000686064.english: Whoa... you really prepared a lot.

1000686065.english: That's almost on the level of packing for a move, isn't it?
1000686065.korean: 그 정도면 거의 이삿짐을 준비해 온 수준인데?

1000686066.english: Fufu, of course! Principal Alpha always says it, right? The more prepared you are, the better!
1000686066.korean: 후후, 물론이죠! 알파 교장선생님도 항상 말하시잖아요! 준비는 많을수록 좋은 법이라고!

1000686067.english: Since I brought all this, let's fully enjoy the summer beach!
1000686067.korean: 제가 이렇게 잔뜩 준비해 뒀으니, 여름 바다를 마음껏 즐기자고요!

1000686068.english: - Thanks to the overly excited Orangeade, the atmosphere in the train quickly heated up.
1000686068.korean: - 잔뜩 들뜬 오렌지에이드 덕분에, 열차 안의 분위기는 금세 달아올랐다.

1000686069.english: - At this rate, we'd surely enjoy a fun summer vacation.
1000686069.korean: - 분명 이 분위기대로라면 신나는 여름 휴가를 즐길 수 있겠지.

1000686070.english: - The train sped so fast it made you question if brakes even existed, and in no time we arrived at the sea.
1000686070.korean: - 기차는 브레이크가 있는지 의심될 정도로 빠르게 달려 순식간에 바다에 도착했다.

1000686071.english: We're here! Commander! Look over there!

1000686073.english: - Beyond the glittering white sand under the summer sun stretched the endlessly vast blue sea.
1000686073.korean: - 여름의 태양 아래에서 반짝이는 백사장의 저편으로 끝도 없이 펼쳐진 푸른 바다.

1000686074.english: - As I watched the cheering club members, my heart swelled with anticipation...
1000686074.korean: - 환호하는 부원들을 보며, 기대감으로 마음이 잔뜩 부풀어 오르려는 순간...

1000686075.english: - ...and then the screen faded to black.

1000686076.english: - System: You enjoyed a fun time at the beach with your club members. Teamwork +10.
1000686076.korean: - System : 바다에서 부원들과 즐거운 시간을 보냈습니다. 팀워크가 +10 증가합니다.

1000686077.english: - Why would they skip such an important scene?
1000686077.korean: - 왜 이 중요한 장면을 스킵하는 거야?

1000686078.english: Sorry, Watson! The test version doesn't have swimsuit data, so…
1000686078.korean: 미안, 왓슨! 테스트 버전에는 수영복 데이터가 없어서 그만...

1000686079.english: Please look forward to the official release!

1000686081.english: - After that, the game still showed several events. Well, since it was mostly the test version, a black screen came up and skipped over them…
1000686081.korean: - 게임은 그 뒤로도 여러 이벤트를 보여줬다. 뭐, 대부분 테스트 버전이라 검은 화면이 나오고 넘어가긴 했지만...

1000686082.english: - Spending school days together with the band members… no, the band club members… was truly a fun and refreshing experience.
1000686082.korean: - 밴드부의 대원들과... 아니, 밴드부의 부원들과 함께 학창시절을 보내는 건 정말 즐겁고 신선한 경험이었다.

1000686083.english: - But all fun experiences must come to an end.
1000686083.korean: - 하지만 모든 즐거운 경험에는 끝이 있는 법.

1000686084.english: - Time passed, and before I knew it, a year had gone by… it was the graduation day for the third-years.
1000686084.korean: - 시간이 흘러, 어느새 1년이 지났고... 3학년들의 졸업식 날이 되었다.

1000686085.english: - That meant it was time to end the game.

1000686086.english: Hehe, it's time to graduate now.

1000686087.english: Did you have fun, Your Excellency?

1000686088.english: I told you so many times that I was a captureable heroine, and yet you still joined the band club.
1000686088.korean: 제가 공략 가능 히로인이라고 그렇게 말씀을 드렸건만, 결국 밴드부에 들어가시다니.

1000686089.english: If you had come to the student council, I would have treated you well…
1000686089.korean: 학생회에 오셨다면 잘 해 드렸을 것을...

1000686090.english: Hehe, just kidding. Thanks to you, I also had a wonderful time. It felt like you were truly enjoying the world inside this game.
1000686090.korean: 후후, 농담입니다. 각하 덕분에 저도 즐거운 시간을 보냈습니다. 각하께서 진심으로 이 게임 속의 세상을 즐기고 계신 것 같아서요.

1000686091.english: So, did you find out who the real member of Orca was?
1000686091.korean: 그래서, 누가 진짜 오르카의 대원인지는 찾아내셨나요?

1000686092.english: As expected of Watson's deduction skills.

1000686093.english: But why didn't you say the answer midway?
1000686093.korean: 그런데 왜 중간에 정답을 말하지 않으셨죠?

1000686094.english: - The moment I realized the real member's identity, I could have just answered right and ended the game…
1000686094.korean: - 진짜 대원의 정체를 눈치챈 순간, 그냥 바로 정답을 맞히고 게임을 종료할 수 있었지만...

1000686096.english: - Because I couldn't ignore Lien, who made the game for me… nor the heart of that member.
1000686096.korean: - 나를 위해 게임을 만든 리앤과... 그 대원의 마음을 무시할 수는 없었으니까.

1000686097.english: - They wanted me to experience fun school days.
1000686097.korean: - 내가 즐거운 학창생활을 체험할 수 있게 하려고.

1000686098.english: Hahaha, I can't beat you. Truly, that's just like Your Excellency.

1000686099.english: So then… the answer you found is…

1000686100.english: - I opened my mouth and said the answer… and Marie smiled and nodded.
1000686100.korean: - 나는 입을 열어 정답을 말했고... 마리는 미소를 지으며 고개를 끄덕였다.

1000686101.english: In Your Excellency's classroom, that member will be waiting.
1000686101.korean: 각하의 교실에서, 그 대원이 기다리고 있을 겁니다.

1000686102.english: Don't keep her waiting too long.

1000686103.english: - Finally, the moment I came face to face with her.

1000686104.english: - The mere ten seconds of running up the stairs felt unbearably long.
1000686104.korean: - 계단을 뛰어오르는 고작 십여초가 너무나 길게 느껴진다.

1000686105.english: - Taking a deep breath and readying my heart, I threw open the classroom door.
1000686105.korean: - 심호흡을 하고 마음의 준비를 마치는 것과 동시에 교실의 문을 열어젖혔다.

1000686108.english: Doesn't it feel awkward for a student to use such an old-fashioned way of speaking? That's why I was acting all this time.
1000686108.korean: 학생이 이런 고풍스런 말투를 쓰면 어색하지 않겠느냐? 그래서 여태까지 열심히 연기를 하고 있었느니라.

1000686109.english: Hehe, who knew it would be so hard to keep my real way of speaking from slipping out.
1000686109.korean: 후후, 원래 말투가 튀어나오려는 것을 참는 것이 이렇게 어려울 줄이야.

1000686111.english: Hmph, you don't believe me. Since you eventually found me, after all.
1000686111.korean: 흠, 못 믿겠구나. 그대가 결국 첩을 찾아냈으니 말이다.

1000686113.english: - Well… truth is, Hirume did give plenty of clues to guess the answer. Sometimes she even slipped and let her natural way of speaking come out. But…
1000686113.korean: - 뭐... 사실 히루메가 정답을 맞출 단서를 많이 주기는 했다. 가끔 본래 말투가 튀어나오는 실수를 저지르기도 했고. 하지만...

1000686114.english: - The words that came out of my mouth were something else entirely.
1000686114.korean: - 내 입에서 나온 말은 전혀 다른 것이었다.

1000686115.english: Hehe… I see. Even in virtual reality, that bond never changes.
1000686115.korean: 후후... 그래. 가상현실 속에서도 그 인연은 변치 않는 것이구나.

1000686116.english: So… did you enjoy your school days?

1000686118.english: The truth is… I was a little worried. I boldly told you to "trust me and wait," but I wondered if I'd fail to give you true memories of school life.
1000686118.korean: 사실... 첩은 조금 걱정하고 있었다. 그대에게 ‘첩을 믿고 기다리고 있으라’고 큰 소리를 쳐 놓고, 정작 학창시절의 추억을 만들어주지 못할까봐.

1000686119.english: All you really did by joining the band club was supporting us…
1000686119.korean: 밴드부에 들어와서 한 것도 결국 우리의 뒷바라지고...

1000686120.english: I didn't actually do anything for you, did I?
1000686120.korean: 정작 첩이 그대에게 뭔가를 해 주진 못하지 않았느냐.

1000686121.english: - Because… every moment with Orca Academy's friends, the band club members, and… with Hirume, was enjoyable.
1000686121.korean: - 왜냐면... 오르카 학원의 친구들과, 밴드부의 부원들, 그리고... 히루메와 함께 한 모든 순간이 즐거웠으니까.

1000686122.english: Hehe, that was the answer I longed to hear the most.

1000686123.english: …When I think about it, I always just received from you, didn't I?
1000686123.korean: ...생각해보면, 첩은 그대에게 매번 받기만 했지 않느냐.

1000686124.english: Sometimes, I wanted to give something back to you.
1000686124.korean: 첩도 가끔은 그대에게 뭔가를 해 주고 싶었다.

1000686125.english: I wanted to show you how much I love you, and how grateful I am…
1000686125.korean: 그대를 얼마나 사랑하는지, 또 얼마나 감사하고 있는지 표현하고 싶은데...

1000686126.english: But words alone were never enough.
1000686126.korean: 도무지 말로는 다 표현할 방법이 없더구나.

1000686127.english: So when I heard that you had never experienced school life…
1000686127.korean: 그래서, 그대가 학창시절을 경험해 본 적이 없다는 말을 듣고...

1000686128.english: I wanted to give you the best school days, that's why I planned all this.
1000686128.korean: 그대에게 최고의 학창시절을 만들어주고 싶어 이번 일을 계획한 것이다.

1000686129.english: But to hear you say such things… I couldn't be happier!
1000686129.korean: 그런데, 그런 말을 해 주다니... 정말 기쁘기 그지없구나!

1000686130.english: - Saying that, Hirume turned on the microphone with a joyful expression.
1000686130.korean: - 히루메는 그렇게 말하며, 행복한 표정으로 마이크의 전원을 켰다.

1000686131.english: Now then, before we turn off the game… I have one event prepared just for you.
1000686131.korean: 자, 게임을 끄기 전... 첩이 그대를 위해 준비한 이벤트가 하나 있다.

1000686132.english: It was originally a song I meant to sing at the festival…

1000686133.english: But since we couldn't prepare the festival scene CG, it got scrapped.
1000686133.korean: 축제 장면 CG를 준비하지 못해서 무산되어 버렸지.

1000686135.english: Hehe, but I can still sing it now, can't I?
1000686135.korean: 후후, 그래도 지금 부르면 되지 않겠느냐?

1000686136.english: It's the theme song of <She Came From Space>, which was the very start of all this.
1000686136.korean: 이번 일의 계기가 되어준 <우주에서 온 그녀>의 테마곡이다.

1000686137.english: I'll show you the skill of me, who was the band's vocalist!
1000686137.korean: 밴드부의 보컬을 맡고 있던 첩의 실력을 보여주겠다!

1000686138.english: - After the song ended, Hirume came up to me…
1000686138.korean: - 노래가 끝난 후, 히루메는 내게 다가오더니...

1000686139.english: - and took the second button from my school uniform jacket.
1000686139.korean: - 내 교복 상의의 두 번째 단추를 뜯어갔다.

1000686140.english: Hehe, this much I can take as the price of admission, can't I?
1000686140.korean: 후훗, 이 정도는 공연의 티켓값으로 받아가도 되겠지?

1000686141.english: Oh dear, you haven't seen all of <She Came From Space>, have you?
1000686141.korean: 이런, <우주에서 온 그녀>를 다 안 봤구나.

1000686142.english: In the final episode of <Space Girl>, there's a scene where the heroines fight over the second button of the uniform jacket at graduation, because of the legend that if you get it, you become lovers.
1000686142.korean: <우주그녀>의 최종화를 보면, 졸업식 때 교복 상의의 두 번째 단추를 가져가면 연인이 된다는 전설 때문에 히로인들이 단추 쟁탈전을 벌이는 장면이 나온다.

1000686143.english: Your graduation is still far off, but if you wait until then, you'll have to fight a fierce battle like in the drama to get the second button… so I'm reserving it in advance.
1000686143.korean: 그대의 졸업식은 아직 멀었지만, 그때 가서 두 번째 단추를 가져가려면 드라마에서 나왔던 것 처럼 매우 치열한 경쟁을 벌여야 할 테니... 미리 예약해 놓는 거다.

1000686144.english: You'll forgive this little bit of cutting in, won't you?

1000686145.english: - Saying that with a sly smile, the mischievous fox spirit made me take a step closer…
1000686145.korean: - 그렇게 말하며 배시시 웃는 요망한 구미호에게, 나는 한 걸음 다가가서...

1000686148.english: But… Mery was too busy, I couldn't help it…!
1000686148.korean: 그치만... 메리가 너무 바빠서 어쩔 수 없었어...!

1000686150.english: I can make the game, but the illustrations… the illustrations I just can't draw…
1000686150.korean: 게임은 만들 수 있지만, 그림은... 그림은 그릴 수 없단 말이야...

1000686151.english: Still! You two can have a good time together in reality, can't you?
1000686151.korean: 그래도! 두 사람은 현실에서 좋은 시간을 보낼 수 있잖아.

1000686152.english: From now on I have to review the test version logs and work on improvements…
1000686152.korean: 나는 이제부터 테스트 버전 로그를 보면서 개선 작업을 해야 한단 말이지...

1000686153.english: …Would it be better if I helped a little?

1000686154.english: No! There's nothing more uncool than butting in right now, don't you think?
1000686154.korean: 아니! 여기서 끼어드는 것만큼 멋없는 짓도 없지 않겠어?

1000686155.english: Today I'm only support. The one who came up with the idea, the one who planned all this for the Commander, was Hirume. So…
1000686155.korean: 오늘 나는 어디까지나 서포트. 아이디어를 낸 것도, 사령관을 위해 이 모든 것을 기획한 것도 전부 히루메야. 그러니까...

1000686157.english: If you put it that way…

1000686158.english: Then, I'll be waiting in your room.
1000686158.korean: 그럼, 첩은 그대의 방에서 기다리고 있겠노라.

1000686159.english: - With Lien's words, the game ended… and I returned to reality.
1000686159.korean: - 리앤의 말과 함께 게임이 종료되고... 나는 다시 현실로 돌아왔다.

1000686160.english: - Putting the VR device back in its place, I left the game center and headed for my room.
1000686160.korean: - VR 기기를 원래 자리에 돌려놓고, 나는 게임센터를 떠나 내 방으로 향했다.

1000686163.english: - I answered with a wry smile.

1000686164.english: You're blaming me for that? Honestly, you should be glad to have such a kind childhood friend, Commander.
1000686164.korean: 거기서 내 탓을 하는 거야? 정말이지, 착한 소꿉친구를 둔 걸 다행으로 알라고, 사령관.

1000686165.english: If I were a bad childhood friend, I'd be giving you a huge scolding right now, you know?
1000686165.korean: 나쁜 소꿉친구였으면 지금쯤 사령관을 엄청 혼내고 있었을 걸?

1000686166.english: - …I'm glad to have a kind childhood friend.

1000686168.english: - Hirume said that with a sultry smile.
1000686168.korean: - 히루메는 그렇게 말하며 요염한 미소를 지었다.

1000686169.english: Well then, what could it be…

1000686170.english: If you give me a kiss to show your thanks… maybe my anger will calm down?
1000686170.korean: 고마운 만큼 키스해주면... 화가 좀 풀릴지도 모르겠는데?

1000686171.english: - Since the new childhood friend herself said that, what choice did I have?
1000686171.korean: - 새로 생긴 소꿉친구께서 그렇게 말씀하시는데, 뭐 어쩔 수 있을까.

1000686172.english: - I decided to obediently do as Hirume said.
1000686172.korean: - 나는 얌전히 히루메의 말을 듣기로 했다.

1000686173.english: …And this is the reason why a sudden boom of childhood friends started in Orca.
1000686173.korean: ...이것이 오르카에서 갑작스레 소꿉친구 붐이 일게 된 이유랍니다.

1000686174.english: That was Talon Feather, special correspondent, reporting on Orca's most secret secrets!
1000686174.korean: 이상, 오르카의 가장 은밀한 비밀을 취재하는 특파원 탈론페더 기자였습니다!

1000686176.english: What should I really do with her…

1000686178.english: Still, I can't get up yet.

1000686183.english: ...More importantly... why are you wearing that outfit?

1000686191.english: A game... nice. What's the genre?

1000686194.english: That sounds good... but this game probably won't be very popular in Orca.
1000686194.korean: 그거 좋네... 그런데 이 게임, 오르카에서는 별로 인기 없을 것 같은데.

1000686197.english: ...At least when I play, I won't turn that feature on.
1000686197.korean: ...적어도 내가 플레이 할 때는 그 기능 안 킬 거야.

1000686199.english: Just in case I'm asking... this game... doesn't have mystery elements, right?
1000686199.korean: 혹시나 해서 묻는 거지만... 이 게임... 추리 요소는 없지?

1000686200.english: You need that much to be Watson.

1000686204.english: Do you think I'd give in to such a temptation?
1000686204.korean: 내가 그런 유혹에 넘어갈 것 같아?

1000686205.english: No, I was going to say that's fitting of a genius pretty-girl detective.
1000686205.korean: 아니, 역시 천재 미소녀 탐정답다고 말하려고 했지.

1000686206.english: Uh, is that okay? I have plans this afternoon...

1000686207.english: It's not bad for my health, right?

1000686209.english: Having you read that out loud kind of kills the mood...
1000686209.korean: 그걸 직접 읽어주니까 상당히 분위기가 깨지는데...

1000686211.english: Is Hirume going to do it?

1000686217.english: Well... just various things about school life from now on.
1000686217.korean: 뭐... 그냥, 앞으로 학교 생활에 대해서 이것저것.

1000686219.english: The cheerleading club seems a bit strange though...

1000686220.english: Club activities! I suddenly really want to do club activities!
1000686220.korean: 부활동! 부활동이 갑자기 무척 하고 싶네요!

1000686221.english: Next time! I'll do it next time!

1000686222.english: Uh... I'll think about that for now.
1000686222.korean: 어... 그건 일단 생각 좀 해 볼게.

1000686223.english: Oh, wait a minute. This situation...

1000686225.english: It was fun. It was enjoyable, but...

1000686226.english: No, no. I enjoyed it. It's just that the thought crossed my mind.
1000686226.korean: 아냐, 아냐. 재미있게 봤어. 그냥 그런 생각이 들었을 뿐이야.

1000686227.english: A life spent buried in work!

1000686229.english: Alright, then since it's come to this, shall we properly enjoy school life?
1000686229.korean: 좋아, 그럼 기왕 이렇게 된 거, 제대로 학창시절을 즐겨볼까.

1000686231.english: I have no experience, but I'll do my best.

1000686233.english: Cool, now you're really Super Neri.

1000686234.english: Ah, I'm going to see if I can join the swim club.

Because the judge of the order also loves the representative of light... Now... shouldn't there be blessings for lovers who love each other?

1000686277.english: What's the difference between a girl who's loved by everyone and happy, and me, who gets insulted and beaten up at the slightest provocation?
1000686277.korean: 누구에게나 사랑받고 행복한 년이랑 걸핏하면 욕먹고 처맞는 나랑 다른 게 뭔데?

1000686280.english: The facial recognition program made a small sound when it recognized the registered object.

1000686281.english: I was sleeping when I woke up to that sound and looked at the monitor.
1000686281.korean: - 자고 있던 나는 그 소리에 잠에서 깨어나 모니터를 봤다.

1000686284.english: There was a source of my anger.

1000686285.english: I feel a pang of resentment at the sight of them walking confidently down the main road, as if convinced of their superiority.
1000686285.korean: - 자신들의 우위를 확신하는 듯 당당하게 대로를 걷는 모습에 심사가 뒤틀린다.

1000686286.english: - They probably believe that what they are doing is the right thing to do.
1000686286.korean: - 자신들이 하는 짓이 옳은 짓이라고 믿고 있겠지.

1000686288.english: Don't you know that strength and weakness, rather than right and wrong, determine victory or defeat?
1000686288.korean: - 옳고 그름보다는 강하고 약함이 승패를 결정 짓는다는 것을 모르는건가?

1000686289.english: - If you don't know… you will pay the price.

1000686290.english: reconnaissance drone followed the mongoose team and assisted them.
1000686290.korean: - 정찰 드론이 몽구스 팀을 따라다니면서 그녀들을 보조했다.

1000686291.english: I watched them from the Orca.
1000686291.korean: - 나는 오르카 호에서 그녀들의 모습을 지켜봤다.

1000686292.english: I was nervous, but that was just tension to prepare for when something unexpected happened.
1000686292.korean: - 초조했지만 그건 예상치 못한 일이 일어났을 때를 대비하기 위한 긴장일 뿐.

1000686293.english: I believe that the Orca members will succeed.
1000686293.korean: - 나는 오르카의 대원들이 성공할 거라고 믿고 있다.

1000686294.english: I recalled what had been discussed during the operations meeting.
1000686294.korean: - 나는 작전회의 때 논의했던 일을 떠올렸다.

1000686295.english: The location of the boots has not been determined at this time.

1000686296.english: However, if Janghwa is fixated on me, I can induce her to attack first by taking the lead.
1000686296.korean: 하지만 장화가 저에게 집착하고 있다면 제가 선두에 나서는 것으로 장화의 선공을 유도할 수 있을 겁니다.

1000686297.english: Rather than showing a clumsy moment of carelessness, it would be easier to elicit a reaction from Janghwa by openly showing that you are pursuing her.
1000686297.korean: 어설프게 방심하는 모습을 보여주기보다는 숨김 없이 장화를 추격하고 있는 모습을 보여주는 것이 장화의 행동을 이끌어내기 용이할 것입니다.

1000686298.english: If we lure Janghwa into attacking first like this, we will pinpoint her location. Afterward, we will attempt to capture her alive.
1000686298.korean: 이렇게 장화의 선공을 이끌어내면 장화의 위치를 특정. 이후 생포를 시도하겠습니다.

1000686299.english: Since our forces hold the advantage in terms of power, we should be able to easily capture Janghwa if we can safely get through the initial battle.
1000686299.korean: 전력상으로는 아군이 우위를 점하고 있기에, 초전만 무사히 넘긴다면 용이하게 장화를 생포할 수 있을 것입니다.

1000686300.english: - Following the plan, the mongoose team walked along the main road in formation.
1000686300.korean: - 작전에 따라 몽구스 팀은 대형을 이룬 채로 대로를 걸었다.

1000686301.english: The women, who had laughed and chatted like friends or lovers when they were with me, were showing their professional side once the operation began.
1000686301.korean: - 나와 있을 때는 웃고 떠들며 친구처럼, 연인처럼 지내던 그녀들은 작전에 돌입하자 전문가다운 모습을 보여주고 있었다.

1000686302.english: Just then, an explosion rang out...

1000686305.english: They are charging straight toward us.

1000686306.english: Then I will move to the sniper point.

1000686307.english: First, I will determine the target according to the standard manual for large iron bugs.
1000686307.korean: 우선 표적은 대철충 표준 매뉴얼에 따라 정할게요.

1000686309.english: I will make sure no one gets hurt until I collapse.
1000686309.korean: 제가 쓰러지기 전까지 아무도 다치지 않게 할게요.

1000686310.english: The file bunker is functioning without issues.

1000686312.english: After one explosion, the Iron Bug's attack began.
1000686312.korean: 한 차례의 폭발 후 철충의 공격이 시작되었습니다.

1000686313.english: It is expected that our goal was to induce the Iron Bug.
1000686313.korean: 우리 목표가 철충을 유도한 것으로 예상됩니다.

1000686314.english: Keep in mind that there is a high possibility of an objective ambush during combat.

1000686318.english: There are no active Metal Parasites.

1000686321.english: If the others are okay, I'm okay too.

1000686328.english: Again, if you collapse, others will be in danger.

1000686361.english: I'd prefer you call it pressure for armed intervention based on pacifism.

1000686363.english: It won't be easy, will it?

1000686371.english: This is a warning. I'll get it right next time.

1000686374.english: This sucks. You two really think you can take on me?
1000686374.korean: 기분 참 좆같네. 고작 둘이서 나를 상대하겠다고?

1000686377.english: I will watch Hongryeon cry out.

1000686378.english: I don't mind if you look down on me, but...

1000686380.english: I'll make you cry your eyes out and apologize, just like Pinto said!
1000686380.korean: 핀토 말처럼 엉엉 울면서 사과하게 만들어주겠어!

1000686381.english: - Miho, Niki, and Boots' battle unfolded tensely.
1000686381.korean: - 미호와 니키, 장화의 전투는 긴박하게 흘러갔다.

1000686382.english: - Niki was so busy dodging bombs that she couldn't use her weapon properly.
1000686382.korean: - 폭탄을 피하는 것에 급급해서 니키는 자신의 무기를 제대로 써먹지 못했다.

1000686383.english: - Stop it! I've eaten a lot!

1000686386.english: - Boots hurled a pile of bombs.
