1000686389.korean: - 미호의 말이 떨어지기가 무섭게 니키는 바닥에 엎드렸다.

1000686390.english: - And the screen was filled with white.

1000686391.english: - The reconnaissance drone's camera, which had malfunctioned from the close-range explosion, returned to normal.
1000686391.korean: - 지근거리의 폭발로 이상작동을 했던 정찰 드론의 카메라가 다시 정상으로 돌아왔다.

1000686393.english: Hey, I told you not to underestimate our sniper, right?
1000686393.korean: 이봐, 우리 저격수 무시하지 말라고 했지?

1000686394.english: Keep throwing them all day. I'll detonate them before they hit the ground!
1000686394.korean: 백날 던져봐. 땅에 떨어지기 전에 터트려줄 테니까!

1000686395.english: I'm the one who detonates them!?

1000686396.english: - Miho shouted to Niki while changing the magazine.

1000686397.english: - I belatedly realized and admired that Miho had shot and detonated the bombs Boots had thrown.
1000686397.korean: - 뒤늦게 나는 장화가 던진 폭탄들을 미호가 사격으로 터트린 것을 알고 감탄했다.

1000686398.english: You've... gotten a bit more interesting.

1000686399.english: How much longer can you hold on-

1000686404.english: -- And before long, the other Mongoose team members and Elly joined up with Miho's group.
1000686404.korean: - 그리고 오래지 않아 다른 몽구스 팀원과 엘리가 미호 일행과 합류했다.

1000686405.english: Sorry we're late. We were delayed dealing with other Metal Parasites.
1000686405.korean: 늦어서 미안해요. 다른 철충들을 상대하느라 늦었어요.

1000686406.english: Miho, Niki. You're not hurt, are you?

1000686409.english: That was me shooting bombs out of the air.
1000686409.korean: 제가 공중에 있는 폭탄을 쏴 맞추는 소리였어요.

1000686410.english: Wow, amazing. To rapid-fire a bolt-action rifle and hit all those bombs.
1000686410.korean: 이야, 굉장했어. 볼트액션 소총으로 폭탄을 속사로 다 맞추다니 말이야.

1000686412.english: What, I just did as planned. We predicted the highest chance Boots would ambush Miho.
1000686412.korean: 뭘, 나는 그냥 작전대로 했을 뿐인데. 장화가 미호를 습격할 확률이 제일 높다고 예측했잖아.

1000686413.english: And thanks to Miho, I survived too.
1000686413.korean: 그리고 미호 덕분에 내가 산 것도 있고.

1000686414.english: Still, it's a pity. If we had joined quietly, we could've caught her in a pincer attack…
1000686414.korean: 그래도 아쉽네. 조용히 합류했으면 협공해서 잡을 수 있었을 텐데…

1000686416.english: Not just ours—considering Boots' safety too, this wasn't a good place for a capture.
1000686416.korean: 우리뿐만 아니라 장화의 안전을 고려하면 이곳은 생포하기에 좋지 못하니까요.

1000686417.english: But since she revealed herself, the recon drones will pinpoint her location.
1000686417.korean: 그래도 장화가 모습을 드러냈으니 정찰 드론들이 장화의 위치를 특정하겠지요.

1000686418.english: Now the initiative has passed to us.

1000686419.english: Guys more unhappy than me? There are some.

1000686420.english: What does it matter to me if those guys are unhappy?
1000686420.korean: 그 녀석들이 불행한 게 나랑 무슨 상관인데?

1000686421.english: Only the guy who looks exactly like me is happy.

1000686422.english: He's just standing there because he's lucky, too.
1000686422.korean: 그 녀석도 운이 좋아서 그쪽에 서 있는 것뿐이잖아.

1000686423.english: I don't need anything else. I just need that guy to be unhappy.
1000686423.korean: 다른 건 다 필요없어. 그 녀석만 불행해지면 돼.

1000686424.english: Based on reconnaissance results, it is predicted that Janghwa will operate using that building as a base.
1000686424.korean: 정찰 결과 장화는 저 건물을 거점으로 활동할 거라 예측됩니다.

1000686428.english: It is the last stronghold built by the residents of Yokohama during the war of destruction.
1000686428.korean: 멸망 전쟁 때 요코하마 주민들이 세운 마지막 보루거든.

1000686429.english: You're saying there are still active AGSs swarming inside trying to fend off the intruder?
1000686429.korean: 아직 활동하는 AGS들이 침입자를 격퇴하려고 저 안에 득실득실할 거란 말이지?

1000686430.english: And do you see? Those Iron Bugs over there.

1000686431.english: Those Iron Bugs were also originally AGS units responsible for guarding the outside of that area.
1000686431.korean: 저 철충도 원래는 저 구역 외부 경비를 맡았던 AGS들이야.

1000686432.english: Even though Yokohama is my backyard, I rarely went there myself.
1000686432.korean: 요코하마가 내 앞마당이지만 나도 어지간하면 저긴 안 갔거든.

1000686433.english: What are you going to do about it? If it were me, I’d just blow this whole area up with bombardment for peace of mind.
1000686433.korean: 어쩔래? 나 같으면 속 편하게 그냥 포격으로 이 일대를 깡그리 날려버릴 텐데.

1000686434.english: Our goal is not to eliminate the boots, but to capture the boots alive.
1000686434.korean: 우리들의 목표는 장화의 제거가 아니라 장화의 생포입니다.

1000686436.english: If the person in charge of this operation says they will do so, of course we should follow.
1000686436.korean: 이번 작전의 책임자가 그렇게 하겠다면 당연히 따라야겠지.

1000686437.english: Shirayuri. Could you please send me the blueprints for this area?
1000686437.korean: 시라유리. 이 구역의 설계 도면을 보내주시겠습니까?

1000686438.english: If not, could you identify the internal structure through infrastructure and scanning?
1000686438.korean: 없으면 인프라와 스캔을 통해 내부 구조를 파악해주시겠습니까?

1000686439.english: Then I'll go scout as much as I can and come back.

1000686440.english: You can't suddenly shoot just because you can't see me when I come back, okay?
1000686440.korean: 나 돌아왔을 때 안 보인다고 갑자기 총 쏘면 안 된다?

1000686441.english: Hongryeon prepared to infiltrate Janghwa's base step by step.
1000686441.korean: - 홍련은 차근차근 장화의 거점으로 돌입할 준비를 했다.

1000686443.english: Hong-ryeon's expression looked colder and stiffer than usual.

1000686444.english: I could not know whether it was because Janghwa was created based on Hongryeon's genes, or if there was another reason, as I was not the person involved.
1000686444.korean: - 장화가 홍련의 유전자를 기반으로 만들어진 사실 때문인지. 아니면 그 외의 이유가 있는지 나는 당사자가 아니라 알 수 없었다.

1000686445.english: That was why this was the only thing I could say to Hongryeon.
1000686445.korean: - 그러했기에 내가 홍련에게 해줄 수 있는 말은 이것뿐이었다.

1000686447.english: Ah, I know what this is.
1000686447.korean: 아, 나 이거 뭔지 알고 있어.

1000686449.english: You shouldn't carelessly say things like that out loud, Tomo.
1000686449.korean: 그런 말은 함부로 입 밖으로 꺼내는 거 아니에요, 토모.

1000686450.english: came to my senses at the words of Tomo and Amy, who were assisting Shirayuri.
1000686450.korean: - 시라유리를 보조하고 있던 토모와 에이미의 말에 나는 정신을 차렸다.

1000686451.english: I tried to somehow explain what I had just said, but I gave up.
1000686451.korean: - 나는 방금 내가 한 말을 어떻게든 해명하려고 했지만 그만두었다.

1000686452.english: Come to think of it again, it was my sincere feeling.

1000686454.english: The team members who heard my words were grinning from beyond the screen.
1000686454.korean: - 내 말을 들은 대원들은 화면 너머에서 싱글벙글 웃었다.

1000686455.english: - Hongryeon also listened to my words.

1000686457.english: - A smile bloomed from a stiff expression.

1000686458.english: Hong-ryeon soon regained her serious expression, but it was not as overly stiff as before.
1000686458.korean: - 홍련은 오래지 않아 다시 진지한 표정을 지었지만 방금 전처럼 지나치게 딱딱하지 않았다.

1000686459.english: Hong-ryeon spoke with the expression of an expert ready to complete their mission.
1000686459.korean: - 자신의 임무를 완수할 준비를 마친 전문가의 표정으로 홍련이 말했다.

1000686460.english: I will give a brief briefing.

1000686461.english: From now on, I will break through the Iron Bug's encirclement and approach Janghwa's base.
1000686461.korean: 지금부터 철충의 포위망을 뚫고 장화의 거점으로 접근하겠습니다.

1000686462.english: Janghwa's motive is presumed to be a personal grudge against me, so it is highly likely that he acted alone.
1000686462.korean: 장화의 동기는… 저에 대한 개인적인 원한으로 추정되기에 단독범일 확률이 높습니다.

1000686463.english: However, please proceed with the operation while keeping in mind that Janghwa might have comrades.
1000686463.korean: 하지만 장화에게 동료가 있을 수도 있다는 것을 염두하면서 작전에 임하십시오.

1000686464.english: In addition to the objective, engagements with Iron Bug (Iron Bugs) and Guard AGSs may occur within the operation zone, so please engage in combat according to the characteristics of each hostile target.
1000686464.korean: 작전 구역 내에서 목표 외에도 철충과 경비 AGS와 교전이 발생할 수 있으니 각 적대적 대상의 특성에 맞게 교전에 임해주십시오.

1000686465.english: Also, Boots has likely set up a large number of booby traps within the area. Please pay attention to what Earl Grey says.
1000686465.korean: 또한 구역 내에 장화가 다량의 부비트랩을 설치했을 겁니다. 얼그레이의 말에 집중해주세요.

1000686466.english: Earl Grey, please detect and disarm the booby traps. Also, please be protected by the other team members as much as possible.
1000686466.korean: 얼그레이는 부비트랩의 탐지 및 해체를 부탁드립니다. 그리고 최대한 다른 대원들에게 보호를 받으세요.

1000686467.english: The remaining members, please focus on combat as much as possible based on your training and actual experience.
1000686467.korean: 나머지 대원들은 최대한 훈련과 실전 경험에 따라 전투에 집중해주세요.

1000686468.english: The agents entering the base are Dragon, me, Earl Grey, and Star in that order.
1000686468.korean: 거점 진입 요원은 드래곤, 저, 얼그레이, 스타 순으로.

1000686469.english: Choco, eliminate hostile targets and provide suppressive fire on the target. Dick, please escort Choco.
1000686469.korean: 초코는 적대 대상의 제거 및 목표에게는 견제사격을. 딕은 초코의 호위를 부탁드립니다.

1000686470.english: Hero, please locate the target's position through reconnaissance.

1000686471.english: The target is highly likely to react to decoys, so once its location is identified, keep the target in check.
1000686471.korean: 목표는 유인 수단에 반응할 확률이 높으니 위치가 특정되면 목표의 견제를.

1000686472.english: Do not attempt to subdue it alone.

1000686473.english: That concludes the briefing. Do you have any questions?

1000686474.english: If not, I will start the battle.

1000686478.english: Conducting recon flight outside the building.

1000686479.english: Target hasn't been spotted yet, but I'll report as soon as I do.
1000686479.korean: 목표는 아직 발견되지 않았지만 발견하는 대로 보고할게요.

1000686482.english: I'll stand in front of everyone, and in front of me is my shield. No one will be able to harm us!
1000686482.korean: 모두의 앞에 제가 있을 거고, 저의 앞에는 제 방패가 있으니까. 아무도 우리를 해치지 못할 거예요!

1000686485.english: Just give the order and I can open a passage anytime.

1000686486.english: No bombs detected beyond the wall.

1000686487.english: We can go in like this.

1000686496.english: Soft-hearted bastards just playing family games. Just looking at them makes me feel sick to my stomach.
1000686496.korean: 가족 놀이나 하는 물러터진 것들. 보기만 해도 역겨워서 토할 것 같아.

1000686497.english: Are the people applauding those things out of their minds?
1000686497.korean: 그런 것들한테 박수를 보내는 것들도 제정신이야?

1000686498.english: Some people do dangerous, dirty, and unpleasant work, yet they just get cursed at and beaten up.
1000686498.korean: 누구는 위험하고, 더럽고, 하기 싫은 일을 해도 욕 먹고 처맞기만 하는데.

1000686499.english: Isn't it natural to get angry and annoyed by that?
1000686499.korean: 그게 열받고 짜증나는 게 자연스러운 거 아냐?

1000686501.english: To think you came to visit me to die first.

1000686502.english: Boots! I want to talk to you!

1000686503.english: Boots! Where are you? Boots! I don't know what happened to you. So please tell me!
1000686503.korean: 장화! 어디 있나요? 장화! 당신에게 어떤 일이 있었는지 저는 몰라요. 그러니 가르쳐주세요!

1000686507.english: I want to hear your story.

1000686508.english: What happened to you. What kind of work you want to do.
1000686508.korean: 당신에게 어떤 일이 있었는지. 어떤 일을 하고 싶은지.

1000686509.english: want to be a source of strength for you.

1000686510.english: Boots. Please come out. I won't hurt you.
1000686510.korean: 장화. 나와주세요. 저는 당신을 해치지 않아요.

1000686511.english: I will protect you so that no one can harm you.
1000686511.korean: 그 누구도 당신을 해치지 못하게 지켜줄게요.

1000686512.english: Hero. Has the target's location been detected?

1000686514.english: If the target behaves in this way, there is a high probability that it will attack the speaker drone, so please exercise caution.
1000686514.korean: 목표의 행동 양식이라면 스피커 드론을 공격할 확률이 높으니 주의를 기울여 주세요.

1000686515.english: Also, although the probability is low, please approach the situation cautiously even if the target surrenders.
1000686515.korean: 그리고 확률은 낮지만 목표가 투항해도 신중히 접근해주세요.

1000686517.english: At walking speed. If it's faster than this, my umbrella won't be able to properly detect explosives.
1000686517.korean: 걷는 속도로. 이보다 빠르면 제 우산이 제대로 폭발물을 감지하지 못해요.

1000686518.english: Ah. There's a bomb up ahead.

1000686519.english: I don't have time to dismantle it, so I will take a detour.
